reviews.title: Good set out of the grounds
reviews.text: First time had stayed at Sanur, which is a lot cooler with the sea breezes.  Even though hotel big, it is compact and very pleasant surroundings with the lovely gardens.  Good access to transport.  Shuttle bus to Hardy's Supermarket is great.  Plenty of pool side lounges, but they weren't really comfortable.  Loved the lounges on the beach (more comfortable) under the shady trees.  Would prefer a top sheet on the bed as well as the "doona".
reviews.positives: On beach front; Walk in Shower; verandah facing garden

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
1. We checked in late, and we waited a long time.
2. The service is terrible, it’s incredibly slow, and you have to remind us three times and wait two hours. There was no blanket in my room.
3. The room is damp and smells old.
4. The old bed is very uncomfortable.
5. The bathroom smells of sakami.
6. The food is disgusting at breakfast and from the menu.
7. The staff is overly pushy when it’s not needed.
8. For some reason, there’s a water bottle opener in the bathroom; it’s unhygienic.
9. The location is far from cafes, civilization and a beautiful beach.

This can’t be called a 4-star hotel, 2 at most.
We chose it because the name is well-known and didn’t expect it to be this bad. There are cheaper hotels nearby that are much better quality.
I really regret spending the money.

reviews.title: bitterly disappointed
reviews.text:
our room was in desperate need of renovation! in the bathroom the toilet bowl was not secured to the floor, resulting in unpleasant odours. the power point in the bathroom was detached from the wall. bedroom walls needed a coat of paint.
we expected a higher standard from the mercure (accor) chain.
reviews.positives: garden view, beach access, clean linen

reviews.title: I did not enjoy my stay, left after 1 night
reviews.text: I did not enjoy my stay here, rooms were very tired, aircon was useless, and staff very unhelpful.

reviews.title: dirty hotel with smelly rooms
reviews.text: The hotel seemed pretty impressive on the internet, the comments were okay so I thought I didn,t take a risk booking this hotel.
reviews.negatives: the hotel gave an overall bad impression : small room and bathroom, dark rooms, dirty room and especially dirty bathroom, not maintained bungalows on the outside

reviews.title: A very good place to relax..
reviews.text: just hope they have complete toiletries such as tooth brush and hair conditioner.
reviews.positives: location is facing beach; staff are friendly; value for money is good

reviews.title: Terrible service
reviews.text:
I checked in and was pleasantly surprised that they offered us a fruit bowl and chocolates to say happy wedding anniversary. I was the only one of us who ate them and three hours later i was lying in bed in agony and rushing to the toilet ( not too clean anyway) as i got food poisoning from this free gift. I was only there for three nights and two of those i could not move.
Although of course im sure the food poisoning was not intentional the staff and especially the manager were totally incompetent in dealing with it. TO the point that i have written to the Mecure head office to complain, they refused to take any responsibility were completely uncaring and were both disrespectful and rude. There has been no response from the head office or from the hotel apart from an email asking why i didn't review their hotel on their website.
While sick i got a call from the manager in the room to say that it was my fault not his.
The hotel offered nothing i wasn't looking for compensation i was looking for a sorry. I asked about pharmacies and they even didn't bothered helping direct me to them. they have a medical room on site which they didn't bother telling me about.
Nobody expects things to go wrong on holiday and this hotel clearly doesn't care when they do. You are a walking wallet as long as you remain that way you will be welcome there, have an issue and they don't want to know.
On an unrelated note trying to get a smile out of the staff is an impossibility from Check in to Check out. This has been mentioned extensively elsewhere.
Beware this hotel, already three other couple planning trips to Bali have been put off going here from my group of friends.
reviews.positives: Pool and the beach were good, grounds well kept

reviews.title: Murcure Sanuar Bali
reviews.text: very very nice hotel located nearby Sanaur area very closed with Sanuar beach.very very nice to stay.who is looking for nice hotel to stay keep quite,clean this hotel is really nice to stay.the staff is ok. the beach also nice
reviews.positives: nice to stay,closed to the beach
reviews.negatives: may not in the center of Sanuar

reviews.title: Murcure Sanuar Bali
reviews.text: Mercure Sanuar bali is very very nice hotel nice to stay. The Mercure Sanuar is very closed with sanuar beach,keep quite,clean. This hotel have a large area.A lot of tree in side. Who are looking  for the nice hotel to stay here is the best choice for you to stay.
reviews.positives: closed with Sanuar beach,Sanuar night life
reviews.negatives: hotel is not located in the center of Sanuar

reviews.title: Expected a lot more from an Accor brand.
reviews.positives: Rooms were spacious and there was a decent spread at breakfast. The property had 2 pools and a tennis court. Direct beach access.
reviews.negatives:
We checked in at 3:30pm and the room still wasn't ready. We also paid for an extra bed but when we arrived back at 11pm, it still had not been set up. Called Guest Services but still nothing so had to head back to front desk. After a lengthy and not-so-pleasant conversation, we finally got the bed close to midnight. The front desk staff who attended to me tried their best to salvage the situation and offered us a free airport transfer.  We appreciated the effort but also expected more coming from an Accor brand.

Rooms also had thin walls, so we could hear our next door's party till early in the morning.

reviews.title: Avoid
reviews.text:
Dirty and old hotel. NOTHING like the photos. Looked like a hotel from the 80s that has never been renovated. 
The food of the restaurant is terrible, breakfast tasteless.
The staff are quite nice but not very efficient.
I got a package and nobody told me so I left it when I had to check out. Called them and complained, then they sent my package with one of their drivers to the next hotel I was staying at.
Bathroom exhaust not working, smelled like sewer.
Small pools, and not very nice. Very expensive for what it is. So many other hotels around with better value for your money. 
Never again.
reviews.response:
Dear Rima,

Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

Thank you very much for your feedbcak, Im Personally respect your feedback during your stay at our resort. Knowing that your experience did not meet up your expectation, it was truly saddened me. Please allow me to express our sincerest apologies. 
At Mercure, we strive to deliver superior service to every guest. I summarized the lack of service in regard of the package deliver, Please rest assured that I take this concern seriously , training has been conducted for all of the staff to improve their attentiveness, and communication skill. 
Rima, I wish that you will give us a change to serve you better in the near future and bring you to experience the showcase of our improvement.

With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Asst. Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Location and staff are the only things going for this hotel.
reviews.positives: Beach and the Cafe next door.
reviews.negatives: The rooms were very tired and in desperate need of serious work. Two of the three rooms we booked needed cleaning (by the guests) on arrival. Daily cleaning was inconsistent eg no towels on some days. The breakfasts were not of good quality and we ate at the cafe next door most mornings.

reviews.title: Hotel is old n not clean
reviews.text: Bad , there was a frog in the room , staff doesnot understand things and hotel is too old

reviews.title: Mercure Sanur, Bali
reviews.text:
Disappointed in the service. When we asked at the check-in desk we were told breakfast was included. After we ate, we were told it was not included. We would not have spent $15. each for breakfast when we could have gone across the street for $3.!! 
Mouse in the room- a big turn off! 
Stone walkways were very slippery when wet. 
The hotel is set up like a maze- very hard to find other rooms because sign markers list "flower" names instead of room numbers.
Restaurants in the area were great!
reviews.positives: Easy to get to attractions from here
reviews.negatives:
Not as close to shopping as I would have liked.
Mouse in room.

reviews.title: rather depressing
reviews.text: We were very disappointed that a hotel of the mercure group was so obviously in need of general renovations. The gardens and in particular the pool areas were uninviting to say the least. The bar area of the back pool was in our opinion not even worth 2 stars and the front pool facing the beach was OK but pool chairs were impossible to use as were not able to be adjusted to sitting position at all. Only alternative was beach. Here, the lounges were in desperate need of upgrading looking very old and tired. Whole complex looked as if in need of care and attention.
reviews.positives: the upgraded room was quite nice and clean but balcony outlook pretty dismal
reviews.negatives: Whole complex in need of care and attention. No atmosphere and did not appear to have much ground or pool staff in general.

reviews.title: it is rundown and neglected
reviews.text: The rooms were unclean and poorly maintained, as were the facilities
reviews.response:
Dear Denis,

Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.

We regret to know that your experience did not meet your expectation. We take note on your constructive feedback of room cleanliness and resort facilities. Please rest assure that it has been share with our respected department for our further action and improvement.

Thank you very much for sharing your experience, I hope we could get another chance to welcome you back and show you all the improvements we have made by then.

Sincerely, 

Eka Handayani
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Professional reaction to bedbugs
reviews.text: We had an encounter with bedbugs the first night and asked to check out the next day. The staff was very and professional and agreed to reimburse the entire room fees. The hotel is located in a very quiet lagoon with the view partially onto the continuing bay. The staff was friendly and responsive.

reviews.title: Poor standard bad staff
reviews.text: Disappointing

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
Hotel was under renovation therefore, front desk was so small and it took long time to check in.
The room was not clean, there are a lots of ants and even more there were a lizard thus I stayed only one night through I intended more.
reviews.positives: Night duty manager offered upgrade room since the romm assigned wsa unsatisfactory.

reviews.title: standard hotel
reviews.text: this location to far from airport, and mercure standard hotel, and need more service for customer

reviews.title: standard hotel
reviews.text: this location to far from airport, and mercure standard hotel, and need more service for customer

reviews.title: Basic rooms
reviews.text: Disappointing as we were told our room weren't ready even thou it was past the check in time. We were told to wait at the lounge without an estimate of the waiting time and the reason for the wait. Room was basic without any decoration at all, bare walls. Surroundings seem dated, our room was on the 3rd storey accessible only by a narrow staircase.

reviews.title: Perfect landscaping and smiling staff
reviews.text: Consistency is about the main thing I can say about the Mercure. I stayed here 3 years ago and the same problems persist. Bad food from the restaurants then, bad now. Great landscaping then, great now. However, the property looks old and tired. My room had cracks on floor and walls. The shower drainage doesn't work and overflows the bathroom. The outdoor rail and seating area is dirty

reviews.title: Very Tired, rundown
reviews.positives: Quiet Location, 2 pools, one away from the kids

reviews.title: Good location, bad service
reviews.text: Its very bad service hotel, I came at 16 Sept at 3 PM but the room still not ready, when we in to the room, the stinky of smoke still stay and its make us uncomfort

reviews.title: 4 star hotel with bad services
reviews.text: Bad location, bad services, bad foods and the hotel should upgrade its facilities.

reviews.title: Super dated / falling apart…
reviews.negatives: Hotel very dated , uncomfortable bed, pillow made out of stone, floor tiles falling apart … Hotel tries to overcharge on everything (they offer pick up service from the airport for 350000r where if you book it through grab (local Uber) it will cost you 100000r. We asked for a late check out by couple of hours and they did ask 600000r (!).

reviews.title: An old resort with a lovely beach
reviews.text: The resort is quite old and the room I stayed in was not very clean - with marks on the walls and on the bed sheet. There was no phone list in the room as to who to call for services.  Surprisingly there is no gym in the resort. The conceierge staff were not helpful at all - when requetsed to get me a metered taxi they only offered private taxis at inflated prices. I walked out of the hotel to get a metered taxi myself and the staff kept on asking "how much", "how much".

reviews.title: Did not get checked in til 1630 food warm in bain Marie and we got sick
reviews.negatives: Food prep and hygiene

reviews.title: Rooms were a bit old and needed a repaint
reviews.text: rooms were a bit dated and needed a re- model , stuffy room and had an odour like it had been sprayed with some sort of lemon spray.it took a long time to check in and even longer to check out , we had to wait for luggage to be delivered from room to car.we paid quite a reasonable amount of money to stay here but were very disapointed. i exspected more from a mecure hotel

reviews.title: We chose Mercure because of the location. The location was amazing but hotel very dated
reviews.negatives: The hotel was very dated and the pool didn’t feel very clean.

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: Mainly old guests, small and old rooms
reviews.response:
Dear Stefano, 

Thank you for sharing your truly experience stay with Mercure Resort Sanur. Please accept our sincere apologies about our room did not meet your expectation. Kindly to inform, we do refurbishment our room and other facilities alternately for better experience stay. We are an authentic traditional resort with quite and relax place to stay. 
Your constructive feedback really motivate us to keep up our performance and service to the guest. 
We hope you can give us another chance to serve you the real standard service of Mercure Resort Sanur.

Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Badly needs updating.
reviews.text:
Arriving into the vaulted reception area we were very impressed. Stunning gardens and waterfeatures everywhere.
Unfortunately from the time we were taken to our room until we left we were never again impressed .
We arrived late and exhausted were shown to our rooms (we had 2 to hold all of the family). The airconditioner  seemed to be pumping out mould spores and sounded like a freight train.
So bad it triggered a major asthma attack. I complained  during our first morning saying I needed a room without mould. They responded by sending someone to check the aircon , he did fix the noise but the mould persisted.
Otherwise, the rooms have not been maintained and need renovation especially the bathrooms.  The towels were threadbare, the pool lounges were collapsing, the pools were too  hot.
I felt a bit sorry for the reception staff, it was obvious they were the brunt of many complaints.
reviews.response: Dear Lynden,Thank you for your feedback. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectation. I apologize for the inconvenience related to the air conditioning system in your room during your stay. I have addressed this concern with my engineering manager for our further action and anticipation. We are conducting regular air conditioning maintenance, however we will look into other possibility to treat them better.We take note on bathroom feedback. In the meantime we are conducting general maintenance for the room to ensure our rooms are comfortable for our guest. This is including re-painting- re-tiling, and furniture re-varnishing. This will be carried on until our resort enhancement take place soon.We have just received our new pool lounge chair and umbrella for our swimming pool side and beach.We do hope that you will give us opportunity to better serve you in the near future.Thank you very much and looking forward to welcoming you again. Sincerely, Eka, Guest Experience

reviews.title: Disappointing for the price
reviews.negatives: Room was smelly and very old....very expensive for the quality and phone didn't work and staff did not try to fix it

reviews.title: Disaster
reviews.text:
When we arrived at the hotel we were kept waiting for check in. Presently a guy comes out and says they have no rooms available as rooms meant for us are "leaking" (Ya , Tell me about it)
Anyway they provided alternate hotel arrangement saying it is next door and saying it is same group... both of which it wasn't. However the alternate hotel was fine and satisfactory.

reviews.title: shocking
reviews.text: my wife and i spent 6 nights at the BINTANG KUTA that was great, we were then booked into the mercure in sanurnfor 8 nights the resort is a 4 star but in my opinion it is only say a 2 and a 1/2  star, the rooms are not up to a 3 star  let alone a 4 star, the beach pool paving had weeds growing thru the joints, the paving was dirty, the restaurant had 2 tarpolins on the roof to stop the rain getting thru, the staff all looked and acted like they did not care, the pool towels were dirty ( the ones we got had big smudges on them ) we booked out 4 nights early with 4 night left,  we then booked into the inna grand bali beach. i would NOT recommend the mercure sanur to anybody

reviews.title: hotel was very unorganised
reviews.text: we found the hotel very unorganised and unhelpful. The porters and room staff were excellent, reception not so good.
reviews.positives: close to beach with beautiful gardens

reviews.title: Mercure Sanur Hotel
reviews.text:
The property has potential but is porely maintained; especially if compared with other experiences we had in other Mercure hotels (Hanoi, bratislava,...). 

The room is big but poorly isolated. You hear everything your neighbours do or say. 

Also the floor was stained, there were a lot of moscitos and the overall cleaniness was poor. The cuisine was also not appealing.

Nevertheless, staff was helpfull and friendly.

Rooms would need an update.

reviews.title: Not willing to visit again.
reviews.text: Generally good but we have an issue with one of the staff where we felt that the staff was not polite in responding to our request.
reviews.positives: It has beach at the back of the hotel.
reviews.negatives: The room is a bit old and the towel is also old.

reviews.title: not so great
reviews.text: This hotel is so big, you feel lost. The rooms are dark, and although it is located at the beach, the loungers etc are dirty and not well maintained.
reviews.negatives: dark rooms, needs upgrading, very impersonal.

reviews.title: Old & bad staff
reviews.text:
incompetent staff, breakfast was horrible, resort and rooms are very old.

Great location, but many other resorts in Sanur which are much better.

Until they do huge renovations and get rid of most of their staff, find somewhere else
reviews.response:
Dear Tavis,
Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely apologize for the disappointing experience you had. Your comments are very important to us, and we are committed to addressing the issues you mentioned.
We are sorry to hear that you found our staff to be incompetent and that our breakfast did not meet your expectations. Providing excellent service and high-quality amenities is our top priority, and we regret that we fell short during your stay. We will be conducting additional training for our team to ensure that we can offer a better experience in the future.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a significantly improved experience.
With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Wouldn’t stay here again
reviews.text: We have stayed at 3 destinations on this trip and the Mercure was out most expensive accommodation, still responsibly priced. On arrival we didn’t get the usual warmth we have become accustomed to on our Bali stays. Our room was dated and in need of a make over and no comparison to other places we’ve stayed for almost have the price. Staff not very friendly or accommodating. We won’t be back.
reviews.response:
Dear Jacqueline,

Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.
Thank you very much for providing your genuine impressions related to your recent stay. First and foremost we would like to express our sincere apology for the shortcomings you encountered during your stay. Your disappointment and dissatisfaction is fully understandable and this is certainly not the lasting memories we wish our guests to remember us by.
We take your comments about the room condition seriously and understand the importance of maintaining a fresh and inviting atmosphere. Please be assured that we are actively working on improvements to enhance our accommodations.
It is our greatest ambition to completely reverse your recent experience with a future visit and regain the initial confidence you once possessed. 

With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Horrible experience
reviews.text:
The hotel is has a beach but the hotel itself is not well maintained. The spa is practically non existent as staff  claimed that it is under renovation ( which is what they said some years back when i visited ). This just spoil the whole spa experience having the treatments done in a groundfloor hotel room.

At night, there are not enough lights in the compound and it can be a daunting experience walking to your room if you are here on your own.

Check out experience was horrid . I was not told when I will get my refund back and one week later I still did not get my refund back.

In my opinion just a very tired resort in need of renovation and better staff.
reviews.response:
Dear Pearl,
Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.
Thank you for sharing your experience with us, and we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you encountered during your stay. We value your feedback as it helps us identify areas that require improvement.
We're truly sorry to hear that your spa experience was impacted by the ongoing renovation
The insufficient lighting in the compound is also a matter of concern, and we will address this promptly to enhance the safety and comfort of our guests during nighttime.
Regarding your check-out experience and the delay in receiving your refund, we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide, and we will investigate this matter thoroughly to ensure it doesn't happen again.
We hope you enjoyed other aspects of your stay which will be the lasting memories you may enjoy.
With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Getting old
reviews.text: Stayed here once before, returned on that basis, staff were really pleasant and helpful, rooms are aging, no mini bar, no fresh milk, (only powdered) rooms were serviced daily, but towels look and feel as if they are being washed in grey cement water, hard and colorless. Pools are ok, breakfast is cheap, $15aud, but cold and fairly bland. There are much better situated and up,arket hotels along the beach now.  Wifi is next to useless, seriously, really really slow and drops out continually, better off walk to nearby cafe and using there’s. Also, pathways between accommodation, pools and reception etc very dark, poorly lit and needs to be improved.
reviews.response:
Dear David,
Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.
It is always a pleasure to welcoming you back and knowing that the genuine service rendered by our staff was impressed you really delight us. It was saddened me to know that you faced some inconveniences during your stay. I noted your comments carefully and our teams have been made aware of the situation you were facing. Please rest assured as they are reviewing this matter thoroughly and actions will for sure be taken to prevent repeat occurrence in the future.
We thank you for sharing your constructive feedback with us and we hope you will be kind enough to give us another chance to serving you better and showcasing the improvement we have made by then.
Sincerely,
Eka Handayani
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: very dissapointing
reviews.text:
We have been going to Bali for 20 years. We travel there every 6 months and have stayed in many hotels, resorts, and private villas over that time. we decided to stay at the Mercure Sunar because the pictures on the internet are very enticing and make the place very inviting. However, that was not the case. On arrival we were put in a room bottom floor of 3 levels. the room was dark, cold and damp. You would pay $30 for anywhere in Bali for this room. I requested another room, only to be told i would need to pay another $120 per night on top of the $110per night we had already paid. I refused. I requested to be transferred to the Mercure in Legian then. Amazing they found another room, near the pool 2nd floor of two levels with a balcony. Much cleaner and brighter and in a little better condition.
The building was very old and needs lots of repair. It is very overpriced and run down. It is quite a long way from the main attractions of Bali. I will not stay or recommend it to anyone.
reviews.response: Dear Carol,Thank you very much for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.I regret to read that your overall experience did not meet your expectations through this review you shared with us. At Mercure, we always strive to craft positive experience to our guests and it makes me sad to see that it was not the case for you. While the renovation plan is on process, we have been conducting room enhancement to ensure our guest enjoy their stay with us. Over the last few months we have focused on new bedroom tiles, bathroom tiles, wall painting and floor grouting.  Apart from the room structure, we have been replacing our towels in the room, pillow, and continuing upgrading our hotel facilities. We will work diligently to do the best we can prior to any refurbishment approved by the Resort’s Owners.  We do hope that you would be kind enough to give us a chance to welcome again in the near future. Sincerely, Adrian Utomo, Executive Assistant Manager

reviews.title: Not up to standard
reviews.text:
This is the email I sent to hotel management
 Good evening David,

My name is Kevin Fitzgerald, my wife and I checked into your hotel on Saturday 27th May staying for 8 nights.
David we chose the Mercure hotel because of its standing in the industry.
Since we have checked in we have had nothing but disappointment which I will list below.
Before I do, I will give you some information about myself and my wife so you can understand where it's all coming from.
I have worked in hospitality for more than 30 years as a chef in the U.K., South Africa and Australia. I have been an executive chef in four and five star hotels and currently I am Operations Manager for 16 kitchens in Perth.
My wife Marlien is a classical trained chef in five star hotels in South Africa and is currently working on the sales side as a key account manager in the industry in Perth.
Also, we are both very well travelled and passionate about the hospitality industry.

•Checked in on Saturday at 11:30pm, could not get a drink or anything from room service at 12.15pm. All they offered was warm water.( this could be fixed if you stocked the mini bars in rooms as a norm in most four star hotels) •there were workers putting up tents for the Sunday market outside our room making a noise when I asked them to stop they were rude.
•The noise went on until 1.30am
•Telephone in our room not working so I had to walk to reception to complain about the noise.
•when choosing a room we also check the bathroom as my wife has a dislike for shower curtains, in your photos on line your rooms clearly show a glass screen. Can you imagine our surprise at a shower curtain.
• only one power point in the room was working under a counter, so we had to get on our hands and knees to plug a kettle in for a cup of tea.
•Bathroom had cobwebs in the shower, not very clean to a four star hotels standard.
• Toilet was smelling like a men's locker room! It was disgusting.
To you and your staffs credit you did change us to another room a
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Fitzgerald, 
Thank you very much for sharing your experience during your stay with Mercure Resort Sanur.
I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectation. As described in our email sent to you, we will definitely take this seriously as it is very important for us to serve you and our guest better. From better product, as well as training and people’s development.
We also receive your comment directly by email, I hope this will cover the feedback on your experience. We also send you an email separately about this as a respond on your previous email.
Thank you very much for sharing your concern and it is our hope that you will give us opportunity to serve you better in the near future.
Sincerely,

Adrian Utomo
Executive Assistant Manager

reviews.title: Room is in needs of total renovation.
reviews.text: Friendly staff but the room is in needs of total renovation , do not use there taxi services, their fares is more than double compared to meter taxi that they will call for you.

reviews.title: Location fantastic,management very BAD
reviews.text:
I have to say that the stay at this hotel member of accor group was a big delusion,the expectations was to be in a luxury hotel which was true only for the location but other then that it was less then 1 star hotel.
On the second day of my stay while taking sun at the beach I ordered a drink at the kiosk and after I gave my room number I went back relaxing at the sun,after 5 minutes the responsible of the kiosk (about 50 y.o. man) came to me and asked several times to give my room number but it wasn't wrong and he said that I should had pay cash the drink as I had no credit card or there was something wrong with my room... I was surprised as the day before checking in I gave my credit card to the front desk and believe me it was a credit card with credit of over$100.000 so I said that there was a mistake made from them side but he really did insist to get paid right away even I told him that I didn't have any money or credit card with me,this made me so mad and ruined my day,because the way he act was so ill-mannered that when I got mad on him and clearly told that if he force me to go to the far away room to pick up the money  I was going to complaint to the manager,then he left but my day was totally blacked down..... again on the beach side I asked for the towel to the person and he asked if I have got the coupon but I didn't received it from the front desk and with really bad manners with no smile which is so unusual in Bali as they all smiles he wouldn't give me the towel so I preferred stay on the chair without because to go to the front desk from the beach is really far.
I believe there is something wrong with the management as the staff all seem to be very unpolite and bad mannered,un-happy.

reviews.title: Average standard at best.
reviews.positives: Short walk to the beach, free shutter to the shopping street, not too far from airport

reviews.title: Great location but in need of refurbishment
reviews.text: Disapointed all round with our stay. The rooms are dull and ingrained with dirt, they need a refurbishment, linen needs replacing, pool towels need replacing, pool beds around large pool need replacing and umbrellas added. There is an area under the reception where you get your welcome drink which is quite dirty, sparsely furnished and smells. On the plus the staff are lovely, great location and the breakfast is good. However until it is done up I wouldn;t stay there again.  I have been to Bali nearly 40 times in 20years and this is the first time I have been moved to write a review of this nature.

reviews.title: quiet location but poor maintenance of the room
reviews.text: We had reserved a double-bed room but in fact we got a twin-shared bed room. The room was quite small, and the bathroom was not cleaned well as I saw some stains on the wall and floor. When I complained to the front desk staff about twin-bed, she said that the hotel couldn't guarantee all reservations from agents. Besides, she said that only few superior rooms had a double-bed. The good thing, they upgraded our room to the deluxe room for the next day's stay. This deluxe room was much better in terms of size and cleanliness. reviews.title: After 7 nights
reviews.text:
We stayed here from March 15 to 22, 2025 with my family of 7 including a person in 70’s and 10’s in 3 rooms.
What we liked: The mature gardens and the space around the buildings and facilities. The nature in the mature gardens such as geckos, snails, birds and other insects. The quiet location in southern part of Sanur yet the various eating out options in close proximity.
What we disliked: 
The level of cleanliness – 
This is not about the age of the facilities. We were aware of the maturity of the facility. It’s about how the room and other facilities are taken care of to maintain the cleanliness. Where to start. 
I requested the 3 rooms to be cleaned every morning while we were in the breakfast. The housekeeping had happened every morning but I needed to call the reception requesting the floor cleaning a couple of times as it hasn’t been done.
In my room, the hand basin and the surrounding area haven’t been cleaned during the housekeeping. I didn’t request the cleaning separately thinking it would be done the next day. That day never came.
After housekeeping was done, the water glasses and the coffee mugs were not replaced. Instead, they were wiped and put upside down on the paper coasters. I requested clean water glasses and coffee mugs through the reception but the delivered glasses and mugs were not clean at all. After that, I washed the glasses and mugs myself. Plus, coffee, tea and sugar sachets were not restocked during the housekeeping. 
The worst of all was the air conditioner filter. As my husband was developing a cold symptom from the previous week, he was spending more time in the room thinking that would help him to recover rather than spending time in the pool. Then, on Day 4, he realized he was sniffling less when he was sitting in the balcony. The difference between inside and outside of the room? The A/C(ordinary reverse cycle unit). What he found when he opened the A/C was a filter which was completely covered with grey dust. It was so thick that looked like some sort of stuffed toy with grey fur. I checked the A/C in other 2 rooms. They were fine. P.S. the photo of the filthy filter is not posted here as it’s too gross. Happy to share privately if you want to see. Please request.
Worth mentioning – 
Room serviced Soto Ayam(chicken soup) was delivered without any cutlery. The lady returned with a spoon but my husband had already finished the soup with a teaspoon.
Once I requested bottled water. I couldn’t wait any longer so I decided to walk to the reception. When I walked out of the room, there was a trolley parked between two rooms with a cleaning gadgets and bottled water. I was happy to help myself with the bottled water.
When I informed the spillage on the floor to staff at the breakfast 3 times in separately occasions and locations, only once it was cleaned immediately. The other two times, the staff who were informed did not take any actions. So we informed the other staff thinking that there was a communication issue. It was only cleaned after the third time. We assumed there was “not my job” attitude between the staff.
reviews.response:
Dear Jihee,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed account of your experience at Mercure Bali Sanur Resort. We are grateful for the positive comments you made about our mature gardens, peaceful location, and the local dining options. It’s wonderful to know that you and your family were able to appreciate the natural beauty around the property.
We are genuinely sorry to hear about the challenges you faced with cleanliness during your stay. We fully understand how important this is to our guests, and your feedback highlights areas where we have not met our usual standards. I would like to assure you that we take your concerns very seriously, especially regarding the cleanliness of the rooms, the A/C filter, and the overall attention to detail during housekeeping. We are investigating the issues you mentioned, such as the unclean water glasses and the missed restocking of amenities, and we will address these with our housekeeping team directly to ensure they are fully rec

reviews.title: Wouldn’t stay more than 3 days
reviews.negatives:
The Mercure I stayed in has clearly seen better decades. The whole place feels aged, and the facilities haven’t kept up with modern standards. This goes especially for the room and bathroom. With the bathroom door open, I literally cannot sit on the toilet. Who designed that. And the shower. Well. Calling it “basic” would be generous. It’s just a shower hose. A one-star special. Mounted at an angle that makes it impossible to turn it on without getting sprayed with cold water first. And to top it off, the water stream shoots straight toward the bathroom door, flooding the place like a mini-tsunami. Why nobody has fixed this in a hotel of this size is beyond me.

At the pool, things were not much better. They scheduled construction work during daytime. Right at the pool bar. Cementing. Heavy tools. Dust. And guests trying to relax next to power tools. I stepped straight through wet cement. Perfect holiday vibe.

And then the pool staff. Honestly. Someone should take their phones away. They sit there scrolling all day and ignore the guests. Everyone is lying on sunbeds with no cushions, not knowing cushions even exist. Unless someone accidentally walks behind the counter and discovers them. Then everyone else suddenly wonders why they don’t have any. Meanwhile the staff keep scrolling. It’s almost comedy.

Management seems nowhere to be found. At least not in the places where oversight is needed. These are basic issues any active manager would notice within five minutes.

Breakfast. Let’s say it politely. Not good. I tried it once. After that I went to the Genius Bar next door because it was simply better in every way.

That’s my honest take.

reviews.title: nice hotel / unhelpful staff
reviews.text: Our stay at Mecure didn't start well when our room was on the second floor when a ground floor was requested due our sons difficulty with stairs. Another room was not available so we struggled for 6 days .We enjoyed the restaurant food but found it quite expensive, the kids enjoyed the big buffet breakfast. The hotel grounds were beautiful and peaceful with very little outside noise coming through. Our room was small but ok with a comfy bed and an air conditioner that worked well and was quiet. Our biggest disappointment were the swimming pools which were hot hot hot , not at all refreshing to swim in and by the end of the day they were quite messy. Also not enough dry pool towels to go round. We also found the hotel a little bit out of the way. There is a beauty spa across the road which was good and a nice beach restaurant left along the beach walk. All in all our stay was just ok but we will probably not be going back.
reviews.positives: private hotel beach / great walkway along the beach / a few good resturants close by

reviews.title: Quiet, Nice, Comfy, Clean

reviews.title: Pleasant, quiet, nice gardens and yoga
reviews.text:
Stay was pleasant but the breakfast staff did not impress me as being overly helpful. I cannot understand why after many years of traveling to Bali that good coffee is not available at hotels like the Mercure especially since many Australians and Europeans who are used to good coffee stay at these hotels. There are many boutique coffee shops now supplying great coffe and cakes in Bali. Please invest in good coffee, good coffee machines and train staff in coffee making skills.

The staff at reception are excellent.
reviews.positives: Availability of yoga, great pools and well kept beachfront

reviews.title: Relaxing, quiet, beautiful gardens
reviews.text:
We had a lovely quiet stay at the Mercure. The gardens were beautiful and well maintained. It was close to the beach and there were many wonderful restaurants and spas near the hotel. Most of the staff were not friendly at the Mercure and did not try to make your stay more pleasurable. After using their internet I found that my messages had been read by someone else, so their internet was not very secure. Staff did not seem to like you using the internet at the coffee shop where they had computers positioned.The price of their food was far greater than at surrounding restaurants so we did not eat at the Mercure, especially as staff were not friendly. Their linen also had holes in it and needed to be upgraded. No maintenance or help was given to us when things stopped working in our room like our phone instead we were ignored. The Mercure is in a lovely position in Sanur and we enjoyed the stay although we would consider staying in another hotel that was more friendly and welcoming next time. 
Using Agoda to book the room was great and we had no trouble with any of the booking so thank you very much for your service we will certainly use you again.
reviews.positives: Gardens, close to the beach, close to restaurants

reviews.title: Mercure Sanur Resort Excellent Choice However...
reviews.text:
We booked this hotel six months in advance because of all the good reviews we read, however a couple of days before we depart, I read some really bad review of the condition of the hotel, my husband decided to call the hotel. After hearing our concern, Hotel staff Mr Triana promised a renovated room.

When we arrived, Mr Triana & Front Office Manager Mr Bagus prepared Room 170 for us. Both Mr Triana & Mr Bagus were very helpful even though they were overwhelmed by guest waiting to be checked in, yet they patiently served us.

Disappointment starts when our room's air conditioner started to leak and wet the whole sofa right below it, the AC wasn't able to cool the room enough, then the shower drain started to clog after every shower. Overall the room condition was bad. We complained to Mr Bagus and left for our activities for the day.

When we return later that night, the AC was still not cool enough and still leaking, the sofa was wet as ever, the shower too still clogged, since we were exhausted, we just left it as it is.

The next day just before we leave, we complained again. And requested to have the sofa moved and to unclog the drain every morning as we were booked for 7 nights.

As for the hotel surroundings, I would say its excellent the gardens & the beach were perfect. 

If you are someone who spends most of the time outdoor, this hotel is an ideal choice, however if you spend a lot of your time in the hotel room, look somewhere else.
My family & I are frequent guest in Accor hotels, can't understand why wouldn't they keep their quality standard like other mercures?

Overall, The pros friendly & attentive staff, relaxing garden surroundings & a perfect beach in the hotel area. The cons very dated room in real bad condition.
reviews.positives: The Staff were very helpful, the beach superb and the room garden surroundings very relaxing

reviews.title: Nice hotel with friendly service
reviews.text: I stayed at the Mercure for 5 nights, booking each night through Agoda day by day as I sustained a pretty serious injury in Bali and was trying to rebook flights. The Internet was really spotty in the room and wouldn't work for hours at a time and some days I had to login multiple times. This hotel was a major splurge for my budget but I wanted comfort and room service. Although it is a nice hotel, and the people are very friendly and helpful, in hindsight I would stay somewhere else. I was given a wheelchair, which was one of the reasons I stayed (I tore my ACL) and the staff would wheel me around when my friends left, but it had a flat tire. There were fruit flies and moths in my room which was really annoying. When I asked for the staff to come by my room later in the morning so I could rest as it took a lot of energy to get to the door, my request was ignored and I was called several times and had to answer the door twice several hours before checking out just to sign something to check back into the same room. Sounds petty but is pretty annoying when I was exhausted and just getting to the door took a lot of effort. The pools were lovely and room service had amazing food (best burger in Asia and really good ribs) and so much cheaper than the restaurant. All in all, I wish I could say this was a seamless experience but it was far from it. But maybe my circumstance was extraordinary.

reviews.title: Great for location on the ocean with the beach walk and sea breezes.
reviews.positives:
Beachfront location was great and the best thing that this resort has to their benefit.
Breakfast was adequate but nothing special. No pork bacon at all, only beef bacon which is not what Australians expect or want with their eggs for breakfast. Staff numbers were inadequate to keep up with cooking for everyone, so get there before the queues. Beach restaurant was great to chill out and eat in, during the late afternoon and evening with the breezes. Easy to walk on the beach walk left, to other restaurants and entertainment at night. Can ride a bike to the ICON.
reviews.negatives:
Rooms were very tired even though we were in Deluxe, cracked floor tiles, gaps in the verandah door frames. No clothes rack other than the one which was hanging over the balcony which meant everything dropped to the ground floor below.
No instructions for the room phone to know what number to ring for service.
No fresh or UHT milk in the fridge and only two very ordinary tea bags, per day, per room etc supplied.
We ordered "lamb chops" in the a la carte restaurant one night. They were lamb "mutton" on mashed "glue", terrible meal.
Eat at the Phrama Resort next door instead, fabulous tasty meals with entertainment.
My confirmation email stated that a "damage deposit of IDR 500,000 is required on arrival ... in cash". This is wrong. The deposit was double at IDR1,200,000 and HAD to be on my credit card, not cash as stated, which they did NOT reimburse on checkout as stated.  Also, it will take up to 45 DAYS to reimburse this, even though it was "released" at checkout, depending on the whim of their Bank.  
Gardens on our side were dry with shrub leaves wilting and the grass was yellow in many places. Lawns needed mowing and edges long and untidy out from our balcony. Pool area was adequate but not cleaned often enough of empty bottles, glasses etc.  Pool lounges were stained and felt dirty because of that.

reviews.title: secluded but right in tourist attractions
reviews.text: We stayed for 3 nights, basically as a stop house, a place to rest for the upcoming weekend bali marathon. Price wise, its fits our budget, facilities are clean albeit slightly worn out. The hotel is unique in that it spans over a number of acres with low rise (3 storey) units scattered among the gardens, if privacy what you are looking for, this is good! We did not eat at the hotel facilities so we cant comment. Sanur is basically littered with hotels along the beach. This hotel is not for disabled, unless you take the garden level (no need stairs).
reviews.positives: garden type hotels, nice if quiet and privacy you are looking for

reviews.title: Key didn't work at first, otherwise very pleasant
Not a hotel that will stay in your memory.
reviews.text:
We booked a deluxe room but it looked like a standard room. No bathtub; safe and tea place inside the bathroom cause the total surface is too small.
I've honestly seen much much better for this price.
The bathroom needs some refreshing maintenance also.
The service staff is friendly.
The price for the breakfast is overexpensive for an island like Bali.
reviews.positives: Nice lobby and good location, near the beach

reviews.title: Recent stay
reviews.positives: Good access to a quiet beach.  Good library of books to share.
reviews.negatives:
Very slow food service at the pool and
Beach.  I don’t come to Bali to hear Elvis Presley and the Beatles and all other sorts of western music pumped in over the sound system, and played by live performers.  Very obnoxious.

reviews.title: Nice hotel but service needs improvement
reviews.text:
Our stay was overall good however there is definitely scope for improvement for eg: 
1) The a/c in one of the rooms did not work and despite several complaints was never fixed
2) No one answers any of the numbers for housekeeping/ reception or even emergency after 10 at night
3) The hotel is understaffed and everything takes a long time to get done
4. The service at the spa is indifferent at best
reviews.positives: Beautiful grounds, Nice rooms, great location, peaceful and quiet

reviews.title: Functional but not great
reviews.text:
1]. rooms are decent sized - beds are firm but comfortable. balcony is very narrow. check-in was smooth and so was check-out.
2]. utilities maintenance is a question mark. thrice our toilet flush broke down and they kept on coming and reporting "it is repaired". we finally started doing it ourselves - the flush clearly required replacement. the aircon was barely above cooling ( son's room was twice as cool - same direction to sun ) but the 'engineer' said nothing was wrong - we had opened all our bags and decided against changing rooms again, but we were not at all happy.
3]. the swimming pool on the left is kind of murky and smells of sun-block lotion - the one on the right in front of the restaurant is clearer and smells less.
4]. the beach out on the back is so-so, but so is it for nearby properties. the boardwalk is very enjoyable - specially on to your left.
5]. you will need to walk 5 mins on your left on the beach to reach the water sports folks. the ones on your right barely get any business and have to call over services from other places. we did jet ski and para-sailing.
reviews.positives: Room layouts, Greenery all around, Staff are patient

reviews.title: great position, "tired" facilities, even with reno
reviews.text:
they asked about my stay and i told them in detail about my issues they responded that they cared and had taken my feedback on board and would work on the things i mentioned.  that was a nice touch.  
we have stayed here alot over the last 7 years and every year ( sadly ) things get a little worse.  the sun lounges need replacing ...they are old, broken and just sad....they are not of the standard lesser hotels currently use and there are not enough of them on a good day.  they have renovated a lot of the rooms and although they are nicer there are some basic over sights for the modern traveller ... power points, the ability to charge equipment whilst not in the room.  some basic things - blind, phone, light globes did not work and although repairs were made in some instances...not in all.   the welcome drink was really awful and not on par with other similar hotels and you had to go get it.  its not worth the bother and is one of the more obvious things that has gotten worse year after year.  its sad because we are not sure we will continue to return.  there are better hotels on offer with better services, facilities and the same prime locational aspects.

reviews.title: Great hotel but below average service
reviews.text:
This was our first trip to Bali.
We stayed in 4 different hotels during our 9 day stay.

I don't know whether it's the culture, but the attitude of "some" people working at the hotel (Mercure) were as low as people working in a 1 star hotel??? Or even lower...

You give tip, they smile and try to get some more, if not they suddenly become meanies!!!!
I didn't have change in my pocket!!! What am in supposed to do?

What kind of service quality is that. From there onwards, I did not give tips to anyone, apart from taxi drivers and restaurants.

reviews.title: a descent and affordable hotel
reviews.text: The stay was interesting. its in a good area. Sanur is the oldest part of bali. so if you are sick and tired of bali's clubs, this area is a good alternatif. reviews.title: lovely place but not very clean shower/bathroom
reviews.text:
we did stay for three weeks with our 2year old kid. location of the hotel in the south of sanur was perfectly; in short distance to restaurants/shops/laundry but away from any noise. hotel has a big garden area, no big buildings. the breakfast was good but after one week you know what's for breakfast next day (very limited variation). our kid loved the pools but you need to take care on your kid since the two big pools get  deeper very soon. a kids pool is available, too, may be 15cm deep but our kid wanted to go into the big pools.
negative: the management need to deploy to the room cleaning staff to include the cleaning of the shower area in the bathroom and need to explain what it means to have a clean shower area (no hair inside, no small animals...)
astonishing: all prices in the hotel are shown in usd and not in local currency. if you like to change money, you get a very bad rate offered and if you like to pay in local currency, you get a bad rate offered again. local currency would be more fair.
reviews.positives: large space of hotel area, direct access to the beach, friendly staff

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: We have been coming to Bali for twenty years and have spent many happy times at the cafe on the beach and around the hotel. The location is wonderful and the people are great. It is the centre of our stays in Sanur!- quiet and pretty and the nicer end of town and beach. This is the first time we’ve stayed. The pools are lovely. Breakfast was fine (we are vegetarian so we had omelettes). The staff were great. The rooms are in need of a revamp. They do look tired and dated. However the bed is massive, the air con cold and the shower hot so what more do you really need? It’s a lovely place with a great vibe.

Warm regards,

Samuel Theodorus

reviews.response:

reviews.title: Be careful if you make a mistake with booking
reviews.text: Hotel all good I have stayed there on numerous occasions as a quick stop over.  Only issue I had this time was I incorrectly hit the wrong date when booking realizing my mistake I tried to change the booking (within 5 minutes) but this hotel had a non refundable policy.  I totally understand and appreciate the non refundable policy, but I think as it was such a short time, the hotel would not have lost any other potential bookings and they would not have started any of the booking processes. Agoda were very helpful and contacted the hotel but the hotel decision was not to refund, I could cancel but not get the money.   I contacted the hotel personally to explain my case but have never received any correspondece from them.  I was a return guest to the hotel (not that that should make any difference), but I will not be staying there again in the future.  So next time you make a booking double, triple check that you have hit the correct date (especially the month)   lesson learned
reviews.response:
Dear joanne,

Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.

We take note on your constructive feedback on cancelation policy, prepaid booking is non-refundable. Please rest assure that I have been share your feedback with our Reservation Manager for further investigation and evaluation.

Once again, your feedback is truly appreciated as it greatly supports us to serve better. We truly hope you will give us another opportunity to serve you better in the near future.
	
Sincerely,
Eka Handayani
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Weak security staff and weak front desk staff.
reviews.text: Check in was a long,  slow  and painful process. Breakfast is extremely overpriced. Wifi was so so. When we were departing, we had called an Uber. Apparently uber is HATED and despised here. When our Uber van arrived, the taxi drivers sitting across the street came barging through the security gate from across the street and immediately began to physically push our driver around, took his car keys and tried to drag him out of the van...wow... all  the while hotel security was allowing the bullying to go on. They scared him so bad, he left in a hurry and we were left to find another method of transportation. Just don't use Uber to leave hotels in Sanur. It was a mob scene and a bit scary. Everyone has the right to make a living.
reviews.response:
Dear Dana,

We thank you for the time you took to share your recent stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.
I was very sorry to hear about the shortcomings you experienced, although appreciative of the amount of detail you included. With regards of check in experience I addressed with our front office manager for evaluation. 
In regards to our pricing, we frequently compare our offers with other hotels in sanur, Bali to remain competitive, indeed we do pay a great attention to value for money.Training will conducted to all of our teams (front office and security) to improve their attentiveness, communication skill and product knowledge.
With regards to the local driver, we are in communication with local authority and this is definitely not the kind of environment we would expect in our neighborhood. We hope you will give us another opportunity to serve you better in the near future.
Dana, thank you again for sharing your concern and we looking forward to welcoming you.

Sincerely,
Eka Handayani

reviews.title: Perfunctory more so than Pristine
reviews.text: Good beach, good pools, nice staff, reasonable meal prices.... - What more could you want really?

reviews.title: nice facilities, dated room
reviews.text: Mercure Sanur is an ok resort. It occupies a pretty substantial piece of waterfront land in Sanur. To get to it though, you need traverse a few back streets, and it is quite far from the shopping / restaurant street. There are however, some decent food options on the same street as Mercure being 'cafe gardenia' and 'mama putu', both provide decent food and value for moneyThe pools are reasonable for a resort that caliber, as are the other facilities.The room service menu is quite good value, although the choices are limited.What really lets this down is the condition of the rooms, they are in need of fairly substantial renovations. As a result, I think Mercure is ok but there are better accommodation propositions is Sanur
reviews.positives: waterfront location, nice pool, don't gouge on room service

reviews.title: satisfactory but rooms are a little dark and worn
Quiet hotel with private beach
reviews.text: I stayed at this hotel with my father (in his 70s) and it was perfect in that it was very quiet and relaxed atmosphere. As it was located on one end of Sanur beach, it felt really secluded and private. I was not too fond of the in-house restaurant but we could find really nice restaurants within a few minutes walk. The staff were lovely and helpful. I found the room itself was slightly small and although they were well-cleaned, the fact is that the buildings are older so it was a bit shabby. There were nicer (much more expensive) hotels just down the beach but I thought this place had the best beach because there was less foot traffic going past.
reviews.positives: location of beach, 2 swimming pools, spacious grounds

reviews.title: Staff location

Enz enz enz een aanrader voor koppels families een nadeel internet hapert zeer veel

reviews.text: It is a very Balinese style hotel which is like a big garden. The rooms are big with a balcony which you can enjoy reading there. Although the located is remote, the hotel provides shuttle bus service to the main street of Sanur. Staff there are very friendly and helpful.

Luckily we had a second room booked for another member of our party so we could leave our  there.  We weren't offered any compenation- not even a complimentary drink. The hotel grounds are well-kept and the staff are friendly bt I think the hotel is too big to cope with customer demands.
We were happy with our rooms which were comfortable (apart from poor AC) but I wouldn't pay the full room price.
reviews.positives: Nice quiet beah, generally friendlt staff
reviews.negatives: The AC didn't work- when we complained to the front desk we were told that several rooms had the same problem because the weather wastoo hot to cope with it!

reviews.title: Mercure Resort Sanur
reviews.text:
The best part is that the hotel gives you all facilities you need and you could walk to the beach anytime of the day. It provides free shuttle service to Hardy's supermarket.
The problem with the location is that it takes 30 mins to airport and Kuta beach. Also breakfast is very expensive.
Overall good service.

On the beach

Good choice if you want to rest in a calm place
reviews.negatives:

Breakfast very expensive

reviews.title: mecure bali
reviews.text: We stayed in the Mecure for 1 night and it was OK, the room was a bit old and a bit smelly with an older style TV with old polyester sheets. The pool was good and had a kids pool. There is a kids club but there is very little in there. The staff were great, very friendly and kind to the children.

reviews.title: Great hotel and good value for money.
reviews.positives:
Hotel is right on the beach at the quieter end of Sanur so its nice and relaxing.  There is always lots of lounge chairs available on the beach and can get drinks brought over as well.   There are 2 pools which is good as not everyone is condensed to one area and again, lots of available lounges.   Property is quiet big so rooms are very private.  Rooms are large and comfortable.  All toileteries provided included as well as bottle water everyday. A couple of pillows were very uncomfortable but asked for a new one which was provided straight away and it was great.  All staff were super friendly and helpful and all requests were met promptly.   We were able to get a late checkout as well which was super helpful.
Location is great and there as lots of eateries within walking distance.  You can hire bikes from the hotel or outside to ride all the way up the beach to other areas.   Getting to the main street for restaurants/shops ect is a bit of a walk but there are always cabs available outside the hotel if needed.
There is a resident cow on the property for some reason but it was great to see that it is cared for and has access to shade, water and food.
reviews.negatives: Buffet breakfast is ok but not great.   There are a few choices but only one toaster so have to line up and wait.   Only a couple of coffee machines which also take a while.   And the balinese music playing is quite loud for some reason.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The hotels situation close to the beach was great.  The hotel its an older hotel . Would have been lovely in its day . The rooms are comfortable but mt advise is not to stay in a room near the back pool its verh noisy . There was a high turn over of very young trainee staff constantly  which led to some confusion with orders at times  The housekeeping staff were great sp helpful nothing g was too much trouble . I didn't appreciate being asked to pay for a loss wooden door key after deciding to move to another hotel for my last few days . I didn't ask for a refund aft all . I was told if you give us a five star review you don't have to pay for the lost key which made md feel very uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Enjoyable, restful and comfortable for a very reasonable price.
reviews.positives: The location was great and the beachfront and walking path along the beachfront a bonus.  The room was clean and comfortable and the staff were wonderful.  The food from the restaurant was lovely and very reasonably priced.
reviews.negatives: The size of the resort is great if you are looking for a large resort with lots of people and families.  We were disappointed with the size of the two pools in comparison with the amount of rooms and people within the resort.

reviews.title: An old hotel with a good location and atmosphere.
reviews.text:
It is a resort with an emotional atmosphere typical of Bali. However, the aging is undeniable. There were a lot of termite droppings in the washroom (they responded quickly, but there were still a few after that). More than anything, the towels were too old, and often only large bath towels were provided, with face towels missing on many days. Even when requested multiple times, they rarely brought them. Additionally, one day during my stay, they said the drying machine was broken and there were no bath towels available until night. This shouldn't be the case, even if it's not a budget inn, right? In such cases, how about providing new towels? The towels already available are worn out and gray 💦.

The pool water was well cleaned, but this time I was bitten multiple times by mosquitoes and possibly blackflies or midges. I was also bitten by ticks a few times. This may be caused by the unusually high rainfall for September…

The staff's response is accompanied by beautiful smiles, but it is often very slow, and there are times when they say "YES OK!" but then do not follow up. This might be something we have to endure 😅.

I would love to explore other places, but the atmosphere and location of Merikur are great, especially the beach, so I will likely visit again next year. I appreciate your continued support. Please assign me a good room 🙇.
