reviews.title: Love the private beach, but sadly the hotel is a bit of a run down
reviews.text: Overall its great. The hotel has a private beach, which is the start of the 5 KM beach walk along the sanur beach. Its not just your typical hotel, but its a resort with villas and a beach house, where most guest spend their time on the pool or have breakfast. Sadly, the resort is a bit of a run down. Its rather old, and lacking maintenance in almost everywhere. Perhaps we were visiting Bali just after the Australia border had just opened and Bali tourism was just beginning to restart.  The resort was almost empty. Regardless we love the resort and will definitely stay again given the chance in the future.
reviews.response:
Dear igo,

Thank you for sharing your experience while staying at Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

We are glad to hear that you had a wonderful stay with us. I believe your feedback will motivate our teams to strive to provide the best service for every guest.

We take note on your comment is regard with the resort condition, we have shared your comment with the team for our consideration and improvement in the future. 

For your safety and comfort we have put in place strict measures adhering to both governmental requirements and ACCOR's ALLSAFE sanitary guidelines. Thus we are looking forward to welcome you back in the near future.

Best regards,
Mercure Bali Sanur Resort team

reviews.title: More expected from a Mercure hotel
reviews.text:
Covid restrictions for travelling and tourism are still very much affecting occupancy of hotels in Bali.
The advantage is that you can enjoy hotels nearly for yourself and for a cheaper price, but in my expirience in this case, still expensive in this case for what you get.
Personal attention is not at its best at the moment, with unclarity and contradictions in some things, like for example saying first breakfast was included and the following morning saying it was not.
For the price i paid, and with plenty of hotels in Sanur beach, i would try somewhere else next time.
reviews.response:
Dear Eva,

Thank you for sharing your stay experience with Mercure Resort Sanur.
Please accept our sincere apologies that your current stay didn't met your expectation. We take note your concern about the breakfast issue. Please rest assured, your feedback has been shared to our management for evaluation and further action.
We hope this will not alter your confidence to our hotel and that you will give us another chance to welcome you again in the future.

For your safety and comfort we have put in place strict measures adhering to both governmental requirements and ACCOR's ALLSAFE sanitary guidelines. Thus we are looking forward to welcome you back in the near future.

Warm regards,

Windarti Eka P.
Room Division Manager

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Tired and needs refurbishment. Breakfast  not up to standard and boring.

Staff lovely.

Rooms maybe 3 star for facilities but 1 star for condition.
reviews.response:
Dear Paul,

Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.

We are glad to know that the service rendered by our staff was impressed you. I am sure that your feedback will motivate my team to keep up their performance. We take note on your concern of breakfast, please rest assure that it has been share with our chef for our evaluation and improvement.With regards of Resort Renovation, we are continually work on improving the Resort, though until a full Refurbishment occurs, the resort design will be remain the same.  Our extensive internal maintenance programs are still carried on and we should have replaced the older mosaic shower tiles which give older impression of the resort.Once again, your feedback is truly appreciated as it greatly supports us to serve better. We truly hope you will give us another opportunity to serve you better in the near future.Sincerely,Eka Handayani, Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: The whole resort needs to be updated, we have been coming her for about 6-7 years and now it's old.
reviews.text:
The entire resort needs to be updated, it's looking tired and in need of many repairs. 
Upon my return to Australia I told most of my friends that I was very disappointed with the resort as it's quite expensive and old and I don't think I would return. 
The menu hasn't changed in all the time we have been coming and great food makes a difference. Most nights the restaurant is empty, it's ashamed because the staff are outstanding.
reviews.response:
Dear Tayla,Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.
We are very pleased to know that the service rendered by our staff exceed your expectation. This is very gratifying news to hear, for all of our amazing team. Our commitment is to provide an excellent service to each and every one of our guests. With regards of refurbishment, we pleased to inform that we do continually work on improvements to the Resort, though acknowledge until a full Refurbishment occurs some elements of interior design will be in the original design.  We have changed nearly 1/5 of the Resorts bedrooms’ tiles over the last few months and more are being completed now.  We will work diligently to do the best we can prior to any Resort Owner’s approval for refurbishment. Once again, your feedback is truly appreciated as it greatly supports us to serve better. We truly hope you will give us another opportunity to serve you better in the near future.Sincerely, Adrian Utomo, EAM

reviews.title: Decent hotel at decent value
reviews.text: Hotel staff are friendly, hotel is in good location on the beach with decent dining options close by, food and beverage pricing is quite high so we didn't use the hotel bar or restaurant at all. Rooms are fine but very variable with some DLX rooms being very roomy and reasonably new while others were a lot smaller but refurbed and some didn't seem to have had much done to them at all so were rather old small and tired and not even close to the same standard as the better DLX rooms(we were part of a group with all of these rooms represented). Pools were fine although the larger one tended to get very hot. Beds were fine but the supplied pillows where very fat so I had to use a decorative pillow or wake up with a sore neck.
reviews.response:
Dear Kenneth,

Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.

We delighted to know that you enjoyed our hotel service and facilities. Your valuable feedback have been addressed with my team and it will motivate them to keep up their performance.
With regards of food and beverage price, it had been shared with our Food & Beverage Manager for evaluation and reference.

Once again, thank you for sharing your experience and we are looking forward to welcoming you back again.

Sincerely,

Eka Handayani
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Need a major renovation
reviews.text: An old hotel with probably minimal budget renovation work. In a renovated room , some fixture in the unit kept failing even after being fixed. The towel hanger kept falling off everytime we put towel on, twice the room black out coz of short circuit. The children play room shaggy.  The beach are great but the  water dirty with all the pollen and debris carried out by the current.
reviews.response: Dear Oemar, Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur. We highly appreciate with your constructive feedback, in regards of resort refurbishment at the meantime we do continually work on improvements to the Resort, though acknowledge until a full Refurbishment occurs some elements of interior design will be the original style.  Though having said this, our extensive internal maintenance programs a drawing to a completion and we should have replaced 52 rooms worth of the older mosaic tiles which look very dated and are hard to maintain.  This project is already 43 rooms completed.  We have also changed nearly 1/5 of the Resorts bedrooms’ tiles over the last few months and more are being completed now. We also addressed your concern in regards of Children play room with our respected department for evaluation and improvement. Thank you very much and looking forward to welcoming you again. Sincerely, Eka (Guest Experience Manager)

reviews.title: Fine hotel for a couple of days.
reviews.text:
Pro: the beach is One of the best in sanur. It's modest and small.

Cons: rooms are noisy.
reviews.response:
Dear Hendrik,

Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.

We glad to know that our beach is one of the best in Sanur. We take note on your feedback of room are noisy, I highly appreciate if you could share the specific noise from the room for our improvement and investigation.

Thank you again for sharing your concern and looking forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,

Eka Handayani
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: nice Hotel
reviews.positives: nice hotel and great beach location. We like it.. thanx u

reviews.title: Relaxing holiday
reviews.text: We throughly enjoyed our stay here always feel relaxed after our visit. We will be back again .
reviews.positives: Loved the cool sea breeze as u relax on the sun lounges. It's peaceful and relaxing . We also loved the gardens

reviews.title: Quietness
reviews.text: Very pleasant
reviews.positives: The quiet location  the beach , not being bothered by hawkers

reviews.title: Nice location, nice enviornment
reviews.positives: Right next to the beach, close to Sanur, easy access for dining and shopping to embrace Bali

reviews.title: Resort hotel with private beach
reviews.text: My husband  and I always choose this hotel  when we want to stay in Sanur area, because the hotel has a private beach with affordable price while others mostly don't have their own private beach or the ones have with very expensive price. The resort is still nice and clean. However a better maintenace here and there would be nice.

reviews.title: Nice surrounds but really dropping the ball!
reviews.text: Well. It was disappointing to be honest. The hotel itself is nice but the have really dropped the ball as far as prices for food and drinks. It seemed glaringly obvious to me that the prices and processes of drinks and food made it prohibitive for guests to imbibe. A beer at the pool was more than a beer in Australia and I kid you not it took on average 5 MINUTES to process the order! I'm not kidding! I and 3 other guests watched the barmen dumbfounded by the meticulous process he was required to follow to fill the order. My beer was flat and warm by the time he finished. Stupid...
reviews.positives: Close to beach, nice pool, nice room.

reviews.title: nice hotel good gardens & swiming pools
reviews.text: This was the 2nd time we stayed there ,will stay again.
reviews.positives: location,on the beach. staff very helpful

reviews.title: comfortable & relaxing
reviews.text: Sudddenly no water supply in the morning of my check out date.
reviews.positives: private beach, hotel cleanliness, attensive staff

reviews.title: great price for an ok hotel
reviews.text: This is by far the best hotel on the beach at a budget price, it's getting a bit tired however the staff are great and the bar prices are ok. Pool is way to hot to actually swim although the beach is great.
reviews.positives: Great staff, great beach location, Good bar prices

reviews.title: Beach Front
reviews.text: if the management decided that when a guest does not hang the "DO NOT DISTURB / PLEASE MAKE UP ROOM" means they required the bed to be made up, then the management need to put this notice in the room. or better, take out the double-sided SIGN. just make it DO NOT DISTURB sign. therefore, the cleaning people would not assume that the sign as DO NOT DISTURB one when they saw it from a distance. I got rooms on upper level (2nd floor). one last thing, I found that most of gardeners were not friendly at all.
reviews.positives: quiet, beach as your backyard, value for money

reviews.title: Comfy and Cozy Hotel
reviews.text: Comfy, clean and large size room, where you can find the beach only few steps from your room.
reviews.positives: Comfy, Clean, Near to the beach

reviews.title: Family Holiday
reviews.text: I was staying there 3 days, it was quite nice to stay there for family holiday. The hotel have the direct connection to beach so we can play there easy. We suggest for the who will g to bali to stay here because it have reasonable price with nice facilty.

reviews.title: Good choice for rest in Bali
reviews.text:
Hotel is very quiet, nice for rest during in Bali. Good resort hotel. There's neach just behind hotel. 
Staff is not friendly at front desk during check in or check out. We have late check in but not welcome by good staff at check in. Really disappointed

reviews.title: Good location hotel by the beach.
reviews.text:
I always choose Mercure Sanur when I go to Bali for diving. The location of the hotel is not far from Sanur dive sites and the dive management I go to (Bali Marine Sports). Also, I prefer to stay in Mercure because of the affordable price with PRIVATE BEACH!!! 
However, during my last visit I was quite disappointed with the service. I booked two rooms this time, the AC in my room was leaking really bad, and the AC in the other room is not cold at all. Called them for repairs but no improvements were made. Asked to change both rooms, they refused, with full booking reasoning.
reviews.positives: Location, comfortable room, and private beach.

reviews.title: very relaxing, quiet place with private beach
reviews.text: We have spent 2 nights here as part of our honeymoon and it has been a great stay. The area is very big, mostly covered with big trees that has created peaceful ambiance, which we both like so much. It also has private beach with lots of lazy chairs, pool bar & restaurant next to it, where we can enjoy the sea view and the drinks at the same time. The room is not big, the design is quite 'old fashion' but it is clean. Overall, we enjoy our stay in this hotel.
reviews.positives: Quiet place, lots of trees, private beach

reviews.title: Nice hotel on quiet end of Sanur Beach
reviews.text: We like this hotel, it is on the quiet end of Sanur beach which is what we prefer. They have a large beachfront area, so it never feels overly crowded, like some hotels, where the lounge chairs are lined up right next to each other. There are 2 nice pools. The hotel is older and the rooms are starting to show their age, but given the price and the nice large grounds, we will continue to go back to this hotel.
reviews.positives: Beach location, large grounds, good value

reviews.title: comfortable hotel but showing its age
reviews.text:
Stayed at the Mercure Sanur for two nights in January 2013. The hotel is well located along the beach which has a great cycle/walk track all the way up Sanur beach. 
hotel is in need of some renovations but for the price i guess you cant grumble.
ok place if you want to stop in to Sanur while your touring the island, i wouldnt stay for an extended period though.
reviews.positives: right next to the beach, nice location in Sanur

reviews.title: Great location but the rooms are a little tired,
reviews.text:
lots of europeans stay at this hotel,not many aussies, rooms were large but not much storage for clothes our wardrobe didn't even have doors, they could do with being refurbished and by replacing the sliding shutters with curtains to let light in.
the beach pool was nice and cool the back pool was very warm and cloudy.
we would stay again because of the location and price.
reviews.positives: Right on the beach, walking distance to restaurants

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Nice hotel for family and honeymooners!  The location that just infront of the beach brings a good relaxation to you and your family. Souvenirs also available surround the hotel. But selection of food during breakfast was so less compare to the price. The traditional massage service on the beach is the best additional service as well as the yoga center.

reviews.title: Great location, friendly staff, very slow service
reviews.text:
I had contacted the hotel via email to ensure a cot was in our room prior to arrival (received return confirmation) as our arrival time was when our baby needed to be asleep for the night after our flight. 

When we arrived at the hotel the reception staff were slow in serving the waiting guests. When we were served I asked if the cot was in the room & was advised no. The checking process was very, very slow to the point that I told the guy that we needed to get to our room so our baby could sleep.

We waited about 30 min for the cot to be delivered to the room after calling reception to follow up.

All staff were very friendly & room was cleaned very well.

Location is excellent, great pools, but no gyms.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and nice service
reviews.text: Love it to stay here and the children could play also

reviews.title: great location
reviews.text:
The staff were just so, nothing special, just did there job. Always a nice smile, but no better service.
We were put in a room they were renovating next door. Banging all day long. Terrable.
The location on the beach is perfect

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel with Direct Access to the beach
reviews.text: This is a great hotel to stay in Bali if you want to stay out of the crowd especially if you go with your family. This hotel has direct access to the Sanur Beach without must accross crowded street first, 2 nice swimming pools, and joging tracks. The room is nice too. This is already the 3rd times i come to stay here.
reviews.positives: Direct Access to the beach and nice environment

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: While it lacks the Bali ambiance, The Mercure is a nice hotel with comfortable rooms and beds, and easy access to the beach along with two pools.  A bit far from town, but a quick cab ride.
reviews.positives: Comfy beds, nice grounds, helpful staff

reviews.title: Ok hotel, nice gardens but needs work
reviews.text:
This hotel is looking old and needs refurbishing. The rooms are reasonably large and comfortable. The gardens are lovely but the pool and beach are disappointing. The lobby service is poor.

There is no real reason to stay here and I only did because other places were full.

reviews.title: Nice place to relax in the room or at the beach
reviews.text:
I love the beach, it's clean and not so much people which more like "private" beach for the guests.. no beach sport around which make situations are quite peaceful.. the kinds enjoyed and they would like to return to this hotel for future visits to Bali..

The security officers were lack of smiles :(

The location is quite far from any where except the beach :(
reviews.positives: Clean beach, quick check in & out process, clean room...

reviews.title: lovely hotel and service with a smile
reviews.text: my husband and i loved to stay at the mercure sanur hotel even only one night. the location is really help us easy to find everything what we needed. the hotel room is clean and quiet as what we like.the hotel staff are also very hospitable and full of smile.the price of the hotel also is reasonable and the most view what we like is the beach. so, we will convey to our other friends and relatives about our lovely experience when we stayed at mercure sanur hotel.

reviews.title: Grounds were lovely and most staff very helpfull.
reviews.text: getting on-line would have been easier if instructions had been provided at check-in. the rooms was quite nice though a little small.  the bathroom needs an update.  i was surprised and disappointed when three staff passed me early in the morning without offering to help me with my luggage when it was obvious i was struggling to pull them on the walkway to the lobby. we stayed only one night but i think we'll check out other hotels in sanur in future.
reviews.positives: The pools, the free bus service to town and the beach access were great.

reviews.title: Great Recreational Facilities
reviews.text: everything is ok except the room and bath room need more modern touch.

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel
reviews.text: Excellent except the room and bathroom needs more modern touch
reviews.positives: various recreational facilities, room wifi access, satellite tv

reviews.title: Good resort but too expensive
reviews.text:
The resort is very beautiful with a great infrastructure however everything within is very pricey. The price of meal and drinks are equivalent to those of a US resort, a bit to expensive for Thailand. Moreover, the quality of food we have tried at the hotel restaurant was usually far from what you would expect from the price tag. If you stay here I would recommend eating in the several restaurants close to the hotel.

The Sanur beach itself is not great, just a waveless shallow sea lagoon. However if you are into water sports this is the place to be.

reviews.title: Gd place
reviews.text: Place was clean and tidy but getting a little old but overall experience is good
reviews.response:
Dear Jaswant,

Thank you for your review and for choosing to stay with us in Sanur.

I am pleased to hear that you found your room to be clean and tidy, and that your overall experience was a positive one. We appreciate your candid observation regarding the age of our facilities; please be assured that we are continually working on maintenance and refreshment projects to ensure our guests enjoy a comfortable and authentic Balinese resort experience.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back during your next solo travels to Bali.

Sincerely,

Samuel Theodorus
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Right on the beach, but...
reviews.text:
After moving into this hotel from another hotel where we had a wonderful experience, it was dissappinting.  I have walked through the property many times during 2020 incident, and always wondered what it would be like staying at this hotel.  It was not what I expected.  My mother on the other hand loved her experience, so mixed reviews.  
After checking in we were told that our room was missing towels and that they would be brought to our room, I had to call the front desk 3 seperated times, with probably 25-30min in between each call as I would forget and stick my head in my phone or laptop, as I was forced to do that as their tv system was down for the entire hotel, and other hotels around the area so they claimed, and I was forced to use my own entertainment gadgets.  
The positives are that it's super close to the beach boardwalk and they do have 2 lovely pools.  I enjoyed their breakfast, as it was not part of my booking it was IDR 150k per person, and for that price you might as well walk down the boardwalk and pop into a cafe, as the buffet had many choices but none of them were outstanding.

The rooms need a update, the tv was large and new, but could not use it.
reviews.response:
Dear Karolis,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your stay with us. We are delighted to hear that your mother enjoyed her experience, and that you appreciated our beachfront location, pools, and breakfast variety.

At the same time, we regret to learn that certain aspects of your stay did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding the delay in receiving towels, the temporary issue with the TV system, and your impressions of the room. Your feedback is very valuable, and we have shared it with our team as we continue working on improving both our services and facilities to ensure a smoother guest experience.

We truly appreciate your perspective, and hope that during a future visit we may better reflect the relaxing and warm atmosphere that so many of our guests enjoy at Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

Warm regards,
Samuel Theodorus 
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Mercure sanur
reviews.text:
Very disappointing being an Accor hotel should have been better standards 
Very worn out room
Dirty curtains etc
No wifi working in our room
Fridge wasn’t working 
Buffet breakfast average 
Some food was not fresh
Staff were polite and helpful 
Pool needs cleaning, green tiles
reviews.response:
Dear Paul,

Thank you for sharing your feedback following your recent stay at Mercure Bali Sanur Resort. We regret to hear that your experience did not meet the standards you expected from an Accor property.

We take your comments about the room condition, cleanliness, and maintenance very seriously. It is disappointing to learn that issues such as the worn-out room, non-functioning Wi-Fi and fridge, as well as the condition of the pool tiles, impacted your stay. We have shared your feedback with our maintenance and housekeeping teams to ensure these matters are addressed promptly.

Regarding the buffet breakfast, we appreciate your honesty and will review our food quality and freshness standards to improve our offerings.

We are glad to know that our staff were polite and helpful, and we hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a more comfortable and seamless experience in the future.

Kind regards,
Samuel Theodorus
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Good Enough
reviews.text:
This hotel is clean but a little dated and worn. The housekeeping staff are kind, effective and accommodating . The front desk is brusque and not particularly helpful. I called the onsite spa because I wanted to schedule a day of treatments and did not receive a response. I ended up using a local spa where I spent a luscious 5 hours.

Food is adequate. Nothing special. Buffet breakfast is ample with lots of choice. Room service is prompt. Soup was served lukewarm, over salted and spilled to wet the napkin with the service. If you want to be by the beach and have good AC, hot shower (if you get up early enough), this could work. If you want to feel special, this is not the place. Decent enough at this price point, but I will look for another option when I return to Sanur.
reviews.response:
Dear Lisa,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re glad to hear that you found our hotel clean, and we truly appreciate your kind words about our housekeeping team. We strive to provide efficient and accommodating service, and it's wonderful to know that they made a positive impression.
We also value your input regarding your experiences with our front desk and spa services. Please accept our apologies for the lack of response from the spa team – we understand how important it is to have timely communication, and we will certainly address this internally to ensure a more seamless experience for our guests in the future.
Your comments about the room service and food quality are also appreciated, and we will look into improving these areas to meet our guests' expectations.
While we’re glad the location and some of the amenities met your needs, we do understand that feeling special during your stay is important. Your feedback will help guide us in making improvements,

reviews.title: Pretty average
reviews.text: nice staff but just all a bit tired and needing a major refurbished
reviews.response:
Dear David

Thank you for your feedback. We’re pleased to hear you appreciated our staff's friendliness, as we always strive to provide a warm and welcoming atmosphere. We also appreciate your honest comments regarding the property. Your input is invaluable, and we’re actively evaluating updates to improve the overall guest experience. We hope you’ll consider staying with us again in the future to see the positive changes we’re making.

Warm Regards
Anna 
Guest Experience

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: The rooms are a bit dated but for value for money as it’s still a huge room with good staff and service. Breakfast is average what’s good is that it’s far away from the hustle and bustle and party groups. Good for family who wants a serene experience. Sunset was amazing at the private beach area.
reviews.response:
Dear Amy,
Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We’re delighted to hear that you found our hotel to offer good value for money, with spacious rooms and excellent staff and service.
We appreciate your comments about the breakfast and will take them into consideration as we strive to enhance our offerings.
It’s wonderful to know that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere away from the hustle and bustle, making it ideal for families seeking a serene experience. We’re also thrilled that you had an amazing sunset experience at our private beach area.
Thank you for choosing to stay with us, and we hope to welcome you back for another memorable stay.

With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Overall good
reviews.text: Rooms are getting a little tired... breakfast good...
reviews.response:
Dear Terry,

Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're pleased to hear that you had an overall good experience during your stay.

Your comments about the rooms are noted, and we appreciate your feedback as we continuously strive to improve our accommodations. We're glad you enjoyed the breakfast, and we will continue to work on providing a satisfying dining experience for all our guests.

Thank you once again for choosing to stay with us. We look forward to welcoming you back and exceeding your expectations on your next visit.

With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: family hotel
reviews.text: a good place to staycation with family
reviews.response:
Dear Aji,

Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.
Thank you for your feedback. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your staycation with us. We strive to provide a welcoming and comfortable environment for families to create lasting memories together. We hope to have the pleasure of hosting you and your family again in the future for more enjoyable experiences.

With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Aging but serviceable
reviews.text: Really showing her age, in desperate need of refresh. Staff were great, location is awesome. Room was about as clean as you get with condition of room. Good budget option if you’re only planning on sleeping there.
reviews.response:
Dear David,

Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

Thank you very much for the insightful feedback of your recent stay.
First and foremost, we would like to express our most sincere apology for the issues you encountered.
We're currently undergoing updates, including maintenance and enhancements to enhace our guest experience. 
David,  ones again thank you for your thoughtful review and we would truly cherish the opportunity to welcome you back to create new and lasting memories.

With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager
reviews.room_type: Family Room, 1 king-size bed and 1 bunk bed

reviews.title: Stay during rainy season
reviews.text: This is my second stay in Mercure Sanur.  I like it because I got a special offers , however this time the cleanliness is a big issues. The beach is rather dirty and many wild dogs and poos everywhere. I dont see hotel staff cleaning the beach. Also in the early morning around 5 am I saw dog poos in front of my room that is located next to the lobby and no one cleaned it. I have to call the cleaners and ask him to clean and gave him tip. Also I joined a fire dance buffet and I saw many flies at the seafood buffet..so terrible . I am not sure I will be back for the third time.
reviews.response:
Dear Sukma,

Warmest greetings from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

Thank you for choosing Mercure Sanur again and taking the time to share your feedback. We genuinely appreciate your loyalty.
We're truly sorry to hear about the cleanliness issues you encountered during your stay. especially beach and surroundings. Your concerns have been noted, and please rest assured that we taking steps to address to improve these aspects.
Your feedback is valuable and we genuinely hope you would reconsider giving us another chance to provide you with improved experience.
With Kindest Regards,
Dayu Purba
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Great location, but rooms in need of renovation
reviews.text: The location is great right on Sanur beach and the resort grounds are lush and beautiful and well maintained. Unfortunately the same can't be said about the rooms, which are old and run down, and also not very clean. Mould growing around the wash basin and dirty light switches... fortunately I had some wet wipes with me. But staff very friendly and helpful... once the rooms are renovated it will a great place to stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Anke,

Sunny Greeting from Mercure Bali Sanur Resort

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.
We regret to know that your experience did not meet your expectation. Our guests’ feedback is really valuable for us as it promotes our improvements, therefore your feedback is very important. We take note on your constructive feedback of the room cleanliness. It has been addressed with our department concern for further action and improvement. 

We believe that through your feedback we will be able to improve ourselves better. We truly hope you will give us another opportunity to serve you better in the near future.

Sincerely,
Dayu Purba
Asst. Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
It was my second time staying at the Mercure Sanur.  I loved the location which is  a beachfront and the Balinese style of the hotel. Nevertheless the room needs a little attention as it looked needing an upgrade.  My bathroom sink tap was loose and hard to open. 
Upon arrival my room wasn't ready but when I gave my feedback about it, the check-in staff offered me a late check-out without a cost. I was happy at that.  Otherwise a lovely place.
reviews.response: Dear Danuta,Thank you for sharing your experience during your stay with us.We delighted to know that you have a pleasant stay with us, happy to know that you were enjoyed our hotel location, service, and facilities.With regards of renovation, we pleased to inform that we do continually work on improvements to the Resort, though acknowledge until a full Refurbishment occurs some elements of interior design will be the original style.  Though having said this, our extensive internal maintenance programs a drawing to a completion and we should have replaced 52 rooms worth of the older mosaic tiles which look very dated and are hard to maintain.  This project is already 43 rooms completed.  We have also changed nearly 1/5 of the Resorts bedrooms’ tiles over the last few months and more are being completed now.  We will work diligently to do the best we can prior to any Resort Owner’s approval for refurbishment. Thank you and we looking forward to welcoming you again. Sincerely, Eka

reviews.title: Rundown Hotel in a Convenient Location
reviews.text:
We encountered terrible service on our first day, having to unload our own luggage from the taxi, wait nearly an hour for our room to be ready well after check-in time, finally get a room with no towels and phone 3 times to request towels, eventually getting them after threatening to speak to the manager. The hotel manager apologised by sending some fruit and a letter of apology, which was a good gesture. 

The hotel is rundown and in need of general maintenance work. The pools are nice (with very warm water!) but the pool area is full of ants with grass and weeds growing between the floor tiles. Breakfast was good, however. 

The room was fine. I was surprised to see the fridge and tea-making facilities in the bathroom! It was quite strange and perhaps a bit disgusting. 

The location is wonderful, right on a beach with good sea for swimming, and walking distance to many shops, restaurants and cheap warung.
reviews.response:
Dear Rachel,

We much appreciate for sharing your experience during your stay at Mercure Resort Sanur.

We regret to know that the first impression on your check in time was did not meet your expectation. Please allow me to express my sincerest apologize. Your concern of general maintenance has been share with management, At the meantime we do general room maintenance including room re-painting, re-tile and furniture re-varnish. In regard of swimming pool cleanliness, our housekeeping already taken immediate action. 

We pleased to know that our hotel location is wonderful, we do hope that you will give us opportunity to better serve you in the near future.
Thank you again for sharing your concern and we are looking forward to welcoming you again.

Sincerely,

Eka Handayani
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Great location - bad service
reviews.text:
we stayed here for 2 nights as we thought it would it would be nice to have a bit of luxury before heading home however it was not that great.
we booked a room with a cot for our son, when we got to the room at 3.30pm there was no cot, we rang reception and were advised this would come straight away. cut to 6pm and there was still not cot we had to then ring again for this to be delivered
on check out we called reception at 11.45am to ask for our bags to be picked up before departing, nothing happened. we left the bags in the room and when checking out (12pm) we were advised that the bags were just being picked up now. cut to 1.00pm we are about to leave and low and behold the bags had still not been picked up! i then had to follow this up with reception again.
the hotel itself is nice, however the service is certainly second rate. 
breakfast is overpriced at per person, when you can walk two minutes down the road and get the equivalent for 5$
same for the taxi to the airport 25$ us when you step outside and get the same taxi for 8$ us

reviews.title: Reasonable hotel at a very good Price!
reviews.text: Overall our stay at the Mercure was enjoyable. The rooms were well kept and towels were always clean. The beach front location was amazing and gave off some great views although it is a little bit of a walk away from the other resorts. I didn't mind this however as it's about 20% cheaper then any of the others. Having stayed at the Mercure once before I was disappointed. Nothing annoys me more then requesting a King Bed and turning up to your room to find that it's a twin share. All the reception staff said was that they didn't have enough king rooms to go around which left me wondering what made them deserve the room more. The facilities were all the same but everything about this stay wasn't as good as my last. The bathroom was older, the room was smaller and up 3 flights of stairs with no balcony space, the pillows were harder to sleep on and the price was a little bit more. Still a good stay, but not nearly as good as it was last year.

reviews.title: It is a decent hotel for the price.
reviews.text:
The exterior of the resort may not look modern, but it has a slightly old-fashioned Indonesian traditional vibe. Just looking at it gives a sense of being on a vacation at an overseas resort. The interior also looks old but is clean. There is a private beach, and there are plenty of beach chairs on the shore. There are two swimming pools; the atmosphere in front of the restaurant is nice, and the main pool is larger and better for swimming. The clientele here seems to be families from Australia or Europe, primarily older white people. Perhaps that's why it feels quiet and relaxed. This was also the reason we chose Sanur. We prefer a peaceful atmosphere rather than the hip, noisy, and youthful vibe of places like Seminyak or Canggu, so this place is just right for us.

We arrived here on a night flight on the first day and had no drinks. (I read a review that someone got ill from a drink provided by the hotel, so I made sure to drink coffee boiled at the hotel.)

I bought bottled water, cola, and Bintang beer at the hotel lobby, and it was quite expensive. It's not a huge amount, but considering it's a hotel, it feels pricey. A can of cola costs 39,930 RP, and a 330ml bottle of water is 24,200 RP.

Comparing this to a small mart outside where a 390ml PET bottle of cola is 7,000 RP and a 660ml bottle of water is 5,000 RP, it feels like they are charging a lot.

Breakfast was personally mediocre and quite similar to other hotels. On the first day, I tried a spoonful of omelet, Indonesian fried noodles, fried rice, sausage, cereal, bread, and fruit. The second and third days had the same menu, so it was just okay. As the main customers are older white people from Australia or Europe, there weren't any dishes that suited the taste of someone like me from Asia.

The burger and ribs at Genius Cafe, located next to the resort by the beach, were delicious.

The beach looked unclean with a lot of debris, such as brown leaves, floating around, making it seem less appealing. It looked nice to gaze at, but I didn't want to go in. In the morning, the water is full, and in the afternoon, it recedes.

Overall, this place in Sanur gives a quiet resort feeling.
reviews.response:
Dear Chanoung,
Thank you very much for your detailed and thoughtful review.
We are glad to hear you appreciated the traditional Indonesian atmosphere of our resort and found the rooms clean and the facilities, including the beach and pools, enjoyable. It’s great that our quiet and relaxed environment matched your preference for a peaceful getaway in Sanur.
We also appreciate your honest feedback regarding the pricing of beverages, breakfast options, and the condition of the beach. Your comments help us understand our guests’ expectations better and guide improvements.
We hope to welcome you back in the future for another pleasant stay.
Warm regards,

Samuel Theodorus 
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Nice 4* in sanur

reviews.text: This is a great place if you get the right room. It's a big complex so if your room is near reception, it's a few minutes walk to the beach. We lucked out with a great room close to the beach and pool.Some of the staff at the bar seemed unhappy and were quite rude, but otherwise, a good place

reviews.title: Good average place ... nothing special, but ok
reviews.text: Security not friendly and helpful, but the rest of the staff ok. Rooms and Restaurants are average, but a bit pricey.

Pros: private beach, quiet resort, huge bathroom
Cons: breakfast not really that good

reviews.text: the staff were very friendly and service was great however,  the rooms were antiquated, small, in need of maintenance and had a mouldy odor

reviews.title: hotel is ok.
reviews.text: seems old . bed is old . goold location . need renovate

reviews.title: Housekeeping
reviews.text: Bathroom cleanliness left much to be desired. I never saw a mop being used or near the cleaning trolleys. We had to ask for clean towels on our 4th afternoon as the room had not been cleaned at 3.30 p.m. And the towels had not been changed previously. No ironing facilities in room. Not what I expected of a Mercure Hotel and Accor as I am an Accor member. And have stayed in their Hotels before which is why we chose this particular Hotel.

reviews.title: An old beauty
reviews.text:
Great hotel, amazing staff but slightly worn out/old. You can tell the place isn't brand-new as there is a lot of wear and tear, although it's well cared for.

The staff is very attentive, always smiling and ready to help. The room was nice but nothing out of this world. Basic bedding and room structure. Shower was damaged/dirty but still quite nice. Nice buffet breakfast although the restaurant is filled with mosquitoes in the morning!

Location can't be beat though... Rooms in the middle of a huge garden and direct access to the beach. Overall a good stay!

reviews.title: 7 night stay in deluxe room
reviews.text: Experienced a pleasant seven night stay in  a deluxe room  set within a block of four in the beautiful tropical gardens. Resort is situated right on the beach in Sanur & within easy reach of many restaurants, particularly liked Mezzanine & Massimmo
reviews.positives: Beach resort, tropical gardens, value for money

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: I was here for just one night. There is benefits from staying here. its far from town so its more like an escape.. nice beach at the front. Breakfest was good.

reviews.title: Bathrooms too old, no exhaust fan, lots of rubbish
reviews.text: Very enjoyable stay, would reccommended it
reviews.positives: Lovely gardens, good balcony , great staff , great location , good value for money

reviews.title: bigmac
reviews.text: Shower was cold every day. Need to put wooden sunlouges around pool with umbrellas to give more option other lounges uncomfotable. Need longer times for shuttle bus. Need a shuttle service to kuta.

reviews.title: pleasant stay
reviews.text:
Staff on arrival efficient friendly.
Room clean cool bed good wifi good.
Beer cold 
will go there again.

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: Good hotel. Beds very comfy. Pool card system annoying. No mosquitos. We were given an room joint to an other room. After coming home from dinner one night and simply talking and watching TV we were called nearly instantly to be told to be quiet as the people in the room next to us were trying to sleep. It was only 10pm and we were not happy about this As we were not even Allowed to watch our tv. Through the door which was not locked so the people next to us could come into our room and vica versa you could hear everything

reviews.title: Affordable and Comfortable
reviews.text: I love this hotel ....the swimming pool seems to have a few problems ....quite cloudy!

reviews.title: Very pleasant and relaxing
reviews.text: Was good, although attention to service around pool are is dropping a little. Staff could be more attentive. I ordered a Martini at beach bar, was awful.... And not a true martini , need to retrain bar staff and provide the correct alcohol. Some things advertised were not delivered like happy hour on spirits/ was only for beer. The bed was not comfortable, might be time for refurbishment.  I have stayed at this hotel many times, I hope it continues to offer a good standard by attending to improvements required.

reviews.title: Good close to the boat to gili's
reviews.text: Very nice, comfy beds and the fact it was on the beach was awesome!
reviews.positives: Cheeseburger on room service was delicious! Close to beach and nice area.

reviews.title: Comfortable and relaxing in a beachside location.
reviews.positives: Proximity to beach, clean & comfortable rooms, friendly attentive staff

reviews.title: The garden and the beach hotel in sanur area.
reviews.text: I'm very satisfied stay in this hotel. We've got a large and huge room. The hotel condition is clean. The garden is very beautiful.
reviews.positives: The garden, the beach and peacefully place

reviews.title: Peaceful and relaxing
reviews.text: As a regular returning customer this is one of my favourite hotels. Value for your money

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: Nice n comfort with good landscaping, quiet also from surroundings.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Nice stay, nice n quiet place to enjoy our holiday. A lot of nice restaurant in Sanur, for sure cheaper than Kuta ( too crowded for us ). Easy access to Denpasar. Better if u have / rent a car... coz no public transportation... except taxi

reviews.title: A great escape
reviews.text: My stay was excellent. The hotel located in a quiet area which helps to relax and get the feeling of a good break from city life.
reviews.positives: Quietness, tennis court, close to the beach

reviews.title: Nice clean hotel
reviews.text: The hotel was good, the staff were friendly and attentive. The downside was the food was not fantastic and was quite expensive but there are great restaurants not far from the hotel. I would recommend this hotel for families and older couples.

reviews.title: A quality hotel, in a quiet setting
reviews.text: This was my second stay in Mercure, Sanur following our previous visit in August 2013. My experience was again one of excellence. The hotel has a superb garden, the rooms are individual buildings and not a 3 story multi room complex which added to the general atmosphere of being in a large garden, somewhat separate from other guests. The staff were all well trained, helpful and when moving about the hotel, greeted you as you went past. The rooms were more than adequate, always clean and very reasonably priced. The mix of guests from European, Australian, Chinese, Korean also added to my happy experience at Mercure. We will return to Mercure , Sanur on our next trip to Bali in August this year.
reviews.positives: Staff, Gardens, proximity to the beach

reviews.title: ok stay will come again
reviews.text:
we stayed from 21 to 25 dec 13, quiet cottages hotel surrounding by big lush green tropical garden tall trees with fresh air, we can see squirrels, birds, frogs and most tropical animals jumping around freely which my daughter loves it. location wise was bit far from shopping center the nearest is Hardy's (20-30k IDR by taxi or 4-5 KM walk), the hotel has its own private beach but its waveless and cleaner than kuta beach for sure. 
some ok resto nearby the hotel, but more restos around Hardy's. over all Sanur is very quiet location and suitable for family vacation not night life seekers. 
if you stay in the ground floor, close the windows during rainy season please as all those bugs, insects and earth worms will climb up to your verandah. the hotel should put a bigger trash bin in the toilet rather than that tiny can, as families produce more trash LOL haha..
kids pool is hidden by the bushes, it will be nicer if they expand the kids pool to become beach view pool ah ya dont forget to try the cocktail at pool bar. jogging track behind the hotel is nice for morning runs. internet free wifi is very slow and limited to 2 device only per room.

reviews.title: close to the beach, big resort
reviews.text:
I chose this hotel because it is cheaper than other big hotels in Sanur and has large garden also near the beach because I need it for wedding shoot in the morning. I chose the deluxe, it has a large room with big bathroom. No bathub. They have shuttle to Hardys, nearest supermarket. The hotel is located a bit away, if you want strategic hotel, this isn't it. It is nice if you want calm and relax feeling.

Room Tip: Choose deluxe room because it is better in everything. It has garden setting and bigger room.
reviews.positives: nice garden, has its own private beach

reviews.title: very nice
reviews.text: Very nice size rooms, neat layout.Staff was very helpful. Internet could be better

reviews.title: Older hotel but clean and comfortable
reviews.text: Older style but clean comfortable and quiet. Best shower water pressure Ive had in Bali. Staff were friendly and very good value for money with the good deal through agoda. The water was abit warm in the pools but they were still inviting.
reviews.positives: Quiet room, good location and good water pressure in shower

reviews.title: highly recommended
reviews.text: This was my seventh stay at the Mercure - I wouldn't consider staying anywhere else.  The rooms are lovely with a good size balcony and it's in a great location.   I have to be honest though and say even though both pools are attractive and clean, the dark blue tiles and being in the full sun with no shade, makes it very unpleasant to swim in - it's always like a hot bath no matter what time of year.  Other than that, I love the Mercure.

reviews.title: Beautiful surroundings
reviews.text: The stay was good. The hotel is beautifully located. Nice walking path. Wish I stayed longer.
reviews.positives: Ocean front, nice layout and good location

reviews.title: Nice to relax, big garden, close to the beach
reviews.text: I chose this hotel because it is cheaper than other big hotels in Sanur and has large garden also near the beach because I need it for wedding shoot in the morning. I chose the deluxe, it has a large room with big bathroom. No bathub. They have shuttle to Hardys, nearest supermarket. The hotel is located a bit away, if you want strategic hotel, this isn't it. It is nice if you want calm and relax feeling.
reviews.positives: big garden, has access to the beach, quiet surrounding

reviews.title: nice relaxing beach stay
reviews.text: we had a great stay, Mercure has nice pools, is nicely located on the beach and several restaurants and shops are close

reviews.title: good value for money
reviews.text:
We had a super short stay less than 12 hours as we used it as an overnight stop on the way to Gili T.  

I would recommend as it was clean, the rooms were nice and it was great value for money.

Staff very friendly.
reviews.positives: clean rooms, good location, 24 hour check in

reviews.title: very enjoyable
reviews.text: this was my 5th stay at the mercure.  I wouldn't stay anywhere else in sanur.  the hotel has a lovely ambience about it, in a terrific location.  staff are wonderful.  room is very comfortable and attractive.  comfy beds also.  first time I have ever had a problem - this time couldn't check in until after 3pm.  they explained check out was 12 and thought that was perfectly acceptable but I travel frequently and this has never happened to me before.  don't let this put you off though - it is ALL I can think of to complain about - highly recommend this hotel.   highly recommend The Porch Café - there Thai Chicken salad is to die for!

reviews.title: old hotel & new experiences
reviews.text: althought it was old hotel but its quite fine and feel new experienced stay there.
reviews.positives: affordable price, nice view, and near destination point

reviews.title: great stay
reviews.text: it was great stay. my sister love the pool, she go to the beach and pool everyday. me and my brother go for biking around the hotel area. my parent walk and run on the beach in the morning and at evening they enjoy the bar. nice stay

reviews.title: Easy and quiet getaway, less commerical
reviews.text: Very value for money because of Agoda price. Very easy access because close to bypass, a number of nice restaurants around the hotel. Quiet and ldeal for relax and rest. Not so crowded like Kuta area
reviews.positives: Quiet, close to beach, easy access

reviews.title: Beautiful Beach Hotel with Friendly Staff
reviews.text: The Mercure is a beautiful hotel but do not make the mistake of booking a Superior room. They are in great need of renovation. The superior rooms are mouldy, the springs are coming through the mattresses and the plumbing is leaky. However that being said the Deluxe rooms are beautiful. The location of the hotel is great and the gardens are Bali at its best. We love the Hotel but would never stay in a Superior room again. Try the Italian restaurant just up the beach- the food is fantastic and very affordable- great seafood!

reviews.title: OK
reviews.text: stay was OK, I was there with a business partner for business in bali, the hotel was really OK
reviews.positives: clean and big room, good bathroom, good bed, fast internet

reviews.title: Nice and clean rooms with private beach available.
reviews.positives: Private beach, location, and clean rooms.

reviews.title: Not bad at all!
reviews.text: lovely room, lovely hotel.  could have done with a better breakfast, but overall, a really nice experience.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: It was nice staying at mercure sanur...staff was excellent ...always smiles and greet you ...service was fast...nice Eco garden and concept of hotel...beach is only 5 minutes walk away...the only problem is there was lots of mosquito and insects ...otherwise is a very nice and quite place to stay!

reviews.title: Kinda rundown rooms but nice hotel on the beach
reviews.text:
We chose the cheapest room they had... which is why it was run-down.  The ones a step up seemed quite nice.
The hotel is right on the beach which is perfect for a little one who wants to play in the sand - and then run to the pool!
Their solution for darkening the room was quite effective (doors instead of curtains) for naps, which we appreciated - we didn't have to put up our travel blackouts at all.
reviews.positives: Right on the beach, reasonable in-house restaurant, good price, warm pools, other services nearby.

reviews.title: Great Hotel and Location
reviews.text: Great place to stay but in need of some modernisation. Rooms are getting a bit dated and worn but good value for money. Note Poor internet access for anyone needing to be in contact.

reviews.title: Great location! Everything is in walking distance!
reviews.text: Had to wait a while for check in, even after their 2pm time. We had adjoining rooms right near pool and beach. Rooms starting to show their age, but still fine. Didn't eat at resort as there is so many great restaurants at both front and back! Really handy location. Would go back again. Great location for water sports!
reviews.positives: Location, right on beach, close to great dining, pubs, shopping and spas

reviews.title: Old Hotel with kindness heart
reviews.text:
Great experience with kind hotel staff.
inline with expectations and honeymooners

reviews.title: quite smile with helpfull people
reviews.text: Very nice and memorable exp. I arrived late and got room with good location. Also staff really helpfull at front desk. Got a great view of sanur beach in the afternoon.

reviews.title: Great Location and Pool area
reviews.text:
We stayed in Sanur for 2 nights.

We thought this hotel was good value for money and the beachfront location was great! Rooms were average and needed a revamp but the two pools were lovely. Sort walk/cycle along the boardwalk will bring you to lovely little locally run shops and cafes which were a bonus as food at the hotel was expensive. 

Overall, a great stay

reviews.title: "Nice hotel, just what you need for relaxing"
reviews.text: I really like staying there, it's a nice resort. Good for holiday with family or friends.

reviews.title: Great value and nice hotel
reviews.text: We love this hotel, the location is really nice, in the quiet southern end of Sanur beach. The beach is nice and wide here, so it never felt cramped. There were plenty of lounge chairs. There are two nice pools to swim in. The grounds are not gorgeous, but it has a nice open feeling which we liked. We would definitely go back.
reviews.positives: Good location on the quiet end of Sanur, nice clean rooms

reviews.title: Great Resort on the Beach
reviews.text: we booked a superior king room and received an old room with two twin beds, we were moved to a newly renovated room with a king bed. the hotel is right on the beach, it's very peaceful with beautiful gardens.
reviews.positives: The newly renovated rooms are very nice, great location and gardens

reviews.title: Nice hotel in the quiet end of Sanur
reviews.text: We liked our stay here. The hotel is in the quiet end of Sanur which was good for us as we had our own car. It may not be as convenient if you don't have your own transport, as it is a long walk from the main strip. But there are plenty of restaurants within easy walking distance. The hotel has a nice feel to it, it does not feel cramped and crowded, even tho' it is a large resort. The beach is nice and wide here, with plenty of shade from trees. We always found lounge chairs and would just drag them to a nice quiet spot under a tree. The rooms are clean, and if you have a deluxe room, they are spacious.

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: the mercure sanur hotel is very quiet and surrounded by lovely gardens the lovely covered deck is great for those rainy times when you still like to sit outside and enjoy the outdoors. the service is quick and very polite staff. we enjoyed a lovely buffet breakfast and good range of meals of an evening in the poolside restaurant. we can be sure you will enjoy your stay here.
reviews.positives: Lovely deck covered especially nice when it is raining

reviews.title: Great value, good location. Extended my stay twice
reviews.text:
I checked in here for 2 nights while I checked out the area. I ended up staying for 7 and hope to be back on this same trip. I stayed in both a superior and deluxe room. While
The deluxe was subtley better and quite bigger both were fine and fairly well appointed for cheap accommodation in Bali. There are two pool areas and a nice stretch of beach so it's easy to find
Somewhere to relax. The beach walk winds it's way through the back of several other resorts so you can Ty ther bars and restaurants without walking too far. If you find the shortcut through it is only a few minutes walk to a great strip of restaurants and shops. The free shuttle
Bus every hour to Hardys was great. I went in to town most days to sample a different section of Sanur. It is a lovely area with a good mix of new and old. And I always felt safe even though alone. A wonderful place to stay.
reviews.positives: Free shuttle bus into shopping area; no fuss accommodation.

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel
reviews.text:
We loved this hotel.
The grounds were really nice, and the pool was large, and a huge beachfront (I wouldn't recommend actually swimming in the ocean though).
The room was ok, my friend loved the room, I thought it was a little dark and small, but we did have a nice little balcony.
Staff were friendly enough, nothing special, no great Bali Hospitality and when I asked for a missing bath robe, it never arrived.
The area is nice. Its better for older travellers, or people not wanting to be harassed by Street hawkers.

BUT DONT' EAT IN THE RESTAURANT... overpriced and the people were rude and were annoyed that they had to serve us. Worst experience. We didn't eat in the restaurant again after that experience.

reviews.title: lovely hotel with nice staff
reviews.text: cons: old toilets, old tv, too far away from city center, too dirty swimming pools, free shuttle bus schedule is too limited (latest bus departs at 5pm and return at 5:30pm, can't enjoy dinner at city center), hotel restaurants charges 21% tax & services. they don't replace new slippers daily, we had to call reception daily to get new slippers.
reviews.positives: secured and quiet environment, punctual morning calls, clean rooms without insects

reviews.title: nice hotel with beautiful garden
reviews.text: The hotel located in quiet place of Sanur, it is recommended for family or honeymooner who wants to have more private stay. In addition, the location is close to a lot of restaurants, just a few minutes walking and it makes many options for either dinner or lunch. The beach in the back side of hotel is a perfect place to swim, water-sport or just sun-bath. last but not least, to hear birds singing in the morning in the garden also makes my staying more live!

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and service with a smile
reviews.text: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The staff are very friendly and helpful. It is by the beach and have lovely seaside sceneries. It is also convenient where there are a number of local food outlets as well as shopping outlets within walking distance. In future will definitely stay again when the opportunity arise.
reviews.positives: Like living in a bangalow unit in the nature garden

reviews.title: Nice location but room was rather tired looking!
reviews.text: First impressions of the hotel were good, check in was fast and easy and the welcome drink and cool towel was a nice touch. The gardens were lovely as was both pools, overall a nice location
reviews.positives: Lovely gardens and pools, nice staff
reviews.negatives: rooms require upgrading, poor internet

reviews.title: Mercure Sanur
reviews.text: Check in was delayed since rooms were not ready. Otherwise had a good stay.local cusine was very good at the resteraunt and well priced. The Beach is not great but the "boardwalk" was nice : free shuttle to Hardys and the shopping area.
reviews.negatives: The poor front reception staff looked harrassed !

reviews.title: ok
reviews.negatives: Superior room i was in was aged

reviews.title: the Mercure Sanur Hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel has many types of room which placed in gardens while u can walk and see many kinds of trees, lovely. Dinner buffet of this hotel is nice taste along with live singing of girl singer who can sing very good love songs on request like La vie en rose, etc.

Beach of the hotel is at end of Sanur, so it is quiet which is suitable for guests who don't like crowd. Also hotel provides shuttle bus to Hardy Supermarket every hours, so u can choose to eat outside hotel with many kinds of restaurants there.
reviews.positives: long private beach of this hotel is quiet, and many suntan bed for guests, lots of tress in hotel's garden to see while walking inside hotel.
reviews.negatives: spa of hotel is expensive compares to Ubud area.

reviews.title: Excellent stay
reviews.text:
We recently stayed here on two occasions. The first time we were very lucky to be upgraded to a family room which was excellent, the second time we had an older style twin room which could have done with a refurb.
However the location is excellent, right on the beach with a lovely pool & near the lively end of Sanur.
Do visit the spa - it looks nice. Also a lovely Italian restaurant nearby (near the Cat & Fiddle pub) with excellent food & very reasonable - called Sal E Pepe.
reviews.positives: On the beach near lively bars & restaurants.
reviews.negatives: Some rooms could do with updating.

reviews.title: satisfied customer
reviews.text: good for couples and families

reviews.title: 2 nights to see the changes
reviews.text: About $***AUD per night with breakfast. Good value for Sanur but felt a little overpriced. Beautiful setting, old building, huge gardens not kept as well as they could be. Room service food was good. Breakfast buffet also fine. On the beach. Lots of activities and food options. Beach walking path is super. Would stay again.
reviews.response:
Dear Dean,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback and for your 8.0/10 rating. I am pleased to know that you would choose to stay with us again and that you enjoyed our direct beach access, the local walking path, our room service menu, and the variety of resort activities.

I have taken careful note of your constructive observations regarding our older buildings and the maintenance of our expansive gardens. Preserving a large, tropical beachfront property certainly keeps our teams busy, and your insights help us focus our efforts on areas that require extra care and upgrading.

Thank you again for your valuable review, and we look forward to showing you further positive changes upon your next return.

Best regards,

Samuel Theodorus
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel, exceptional staff
reviews.text:
Lovely hotel, all rooms are in blocks of 4 to 6 rooms in beautiful traditional gardens adjacent to the beach.  The staff are absolutely beautiful and super friendly.  The rooms are getting a little old but everything works including the air con and fridge and the massive king size bed was very comfortable. 
The pools look beautiful but the temperature was too warm to enable a cool off in hot weather.  The only other negative was the restaurant where the food was expensive and quite poor,  and the staff charged $10.00 aud for 2 games of pool on a very dirty pool table.  
But there are lots of warungs and restaurants nearby as an alternative.
reviews.response:
Dear Christine,

Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback following your recent nine-night stay. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed our traditional gardens and found our staff to be "absolutely beautiful" and super friendly. It is also rewarding to know that despite the classic feel of our rooms, you found the king-size bed comfortable and the amenities in good working order.

However, I sincerely appreciate your constructive comments regarding the areas where we fell short. I have shared your feedback about the pool temperature and the cleanliness of the pool table with our maintenance team for immediate attention. Furthermore, your observations regarding the value and quality of our restaurant offerings have been relayed to our Executive Chef and Food & Beverage Manager to ensure we are meeting the high standards our guests expect.

We value your honesty as it helps us refine the guest experience. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide an even more s

reviews.title: Das Hotel ist in die Jahre gekommen
reviews.text:
Das Hotel ist in die Jahre gekommen und nichts gemacht worden.
Die Badezimmer roch sehr stark nach Kanalisation, die Toiletten sind nicht mehr sauber versiegelt mit silicon und deswegen kommt Kanalisation Geruch permanent raus. Habe reklamiert und habe ein anderes Zimmer bekommen aber es war das gleiche . Die Möbel sind veraltet.
Das Frühstück ist simpel und nach 2 Tagen reicht es schon man geht außerhalb frühstücken.
Ich werde es nicht mehr buchen zu hochpreisig für das was man bekommt.
reviews.response:
Dear Ulrike,

Thank you for choosing Mercure Bali Sanur Resort and for sharing your candid feedback.

While I am very pleased that our team’s service earned a perfect score from you, I am concerned to hear about the maintenance issues you encountered. Please accept my sincere apologies for the recurring odors and the condition of the bathroom fixtures in your rooms. We understand that even with a room move, the lack of improvement was disappointing. Please be assured that I have shared your specific technical feedback regarding the plumbing and silicone seals with our Engineering Manager for immediate investigation and rectification.

I have also noted your comments regarding the breakfast variety and our furniture. We are continuously looking for ways to enhance our classic guest rooms and culinary offerings to ensure they reflect the value our guests expect from an international resort.

We appreciate your honesty, as it is vital to our improvement efforts. We hope you were still abl

reviews.title: Nice place to stay
reviews.text:
All staff excellent in term of services.. love the enviroment surrounding with beach walk..
Old room condition is the only issue where need major renovation to improve.
reviews.response:
Dear Hakim,

Thank you for sharing your feedback and for choosing to stay at Mercure Bali Sanur Resort.

We are pleased to know that you enjoyed the service provided by our team as well as the relaxing environment around the resort, especially the beachfront walkway which many of our guests appreciate for its peaceful atmosphere.

At the same time, we value your comment regarding the condition of the room. Feedback like yours is very important for us as we continue to evaluate improvement plans and enhancements to ensure greater comfort for our guests in the future.

We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience and hope to welcome you again for another pleasant stay in Sanur.

Warm regards,
Samuel Theodorus
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Ok for a 4 star
reviews.text: The hotel is okay for holidays but this place is not for the insect haters. Rooms have yellow light only and food is mid.
reviews.response:
Dear Catherine,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We’re glad to know that you found our hotel suitable for your holiday, though we’re sorry to hear that certain aspects did not fully meet your expectations.

We understand your concerns about insects—being a large, tropical, garden-style resort close to the beach, occasional insects can appear despite our regular pest-control treatments. We will continue improving our preventive measures wherever possible.

Your comments regarding the room lighting and food quality are also well noted, and we’ll review them with our team to enhance the guest experience.

We appreciate your candid feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a more enjoyable stay.
